F8AILycmdj2kuOVa.name: Playtest 1 - The Ring of Valor
F8AILycmdj2kuOVa.caption: Test your mettle in the Ring of Valor, the first available playtest for the Crucible game system.
F8AILycmdj2kuOVa.description: The Ring of Valor is a guided introduction to character development and combat mechanics in Crucible which places players in the role of a gladiatorial team facing a sequence of escalating challenges.

mwPldduxbQwyZ9nI.name: Playtest One: The Ring of Valor

4JQPTwQU8ojlu4UI.name: Introduction
4JQPTwQU8ojlu4UI.text:
Playtest One: The Ring of Valor is a guided introduction to character development and combat mechanics in Crucible which places players in the role of a gladiatorial team facing a sequence of challenges in the Ring of Valor.

Players may either create their own characters from scratch following the @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.gszlBVQ5fGh3y0I6]{Character Creation} process (recommended) or use the Level 1 premade characters provided in the Pregenerated Heroes compendium pack.

This challenge is designed and balanced for a party of four player characters, although we encourage you to test with a smaller or larger party as well. The difficulty of challenges can be adjusted by manipulating the threat level of @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.v1dqTT3NI35lFNxM]{Adversaries}.

The Ring of Valor consists of six battles, one each day, during which the party faces increasingly dangerous opponents culminating in a final match against the reigning champions - the last group of heroes to overcome the arena. After each encounter, the party advances in level before facing their next test. Each battle is designed to introduce new gameplay mechanics and provide an opportunity to test out new abilities gained through level advancement.

Providing Feedback

If you test Crucible and experience the Ring of Valor, please help us by taking a few moments to @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.5SgXrAKS2EnqVggJ.JournalEntryPage.4Ggutuh9uzhcEXSK]{Provide Feedback} in the #crucible channel of our community Discord server.

Regarding Defeat

Normally, in Crucible - defeat whether by Insanity or Death would be the end of a character's journey. In the case of this initial playtest, however, we recommend that you as the Gamemaster adopt a more flexible approach.

In the interest of testing the system and collecting useful feedback, we recommend allowing a party who experiences defeat to re-attempt the same challenge until successful OR to be permitted to advance to the next challenge regardless should one of the daily challenges prove too difficult to be surmounted.

J2LIX6gyoEEL9IDc.name: Day One - The Feral Scramble
J2LIX6gyoEEL9IDc.text:
In the Day One challenge, 4 Level 1 heroes face off against a pack of frenzied beasts:

  • 4x @UUID[Actor.tqLT327VnrBXrLtj]{Huiana} (Level ½ Minion)

  • 4x @UUID[Actor.owg68yqumk7KxV9B]{Baizaz} (Level ½ Minion)

Protagonist Threat: 1 × 4 = 4

Adversary Threat: ⅓ × 8 = 2.66

Encounter Difficulty: Difficult

Introduction

The party emerges onto the sand to find themselves in a large arena, surrounded by stands containing a cheering crowd. A commentator spectates from a booth overlooking the sands, where the arena's owner sits. The Commentator's voice is amplified by magic, carried throughout the arena.

We're here on the first day of the Grand Exhibition at the Ring of Valor, and the crowd is already going wild! The first match of the day is about to begin, and as the newcomers step onto the sand for the first time, the crowd is clearly eager to see how they perform. The Scramble is always an audience favorite- will the newcomers survive and triumph against these ravenous wild beasts?!

The party is instructed to proceed to stand in the center of the arena. The Huiana and Baizas are positioned on either side of the arena in groups of 4. Once the party reaches the center of the arena, a few moments are given to build tension and then the beasts emerge from the tunnels on the East and West sides of the map. Add everyone to a Combat encounter and start the combat to roll Initiative for Round 1.

Tactics

The Huiana are pack hunters and rely on flanking tactics to surround and harry a single protagonist, benefitting from their Pack Hunter talent. This challenge serves as an introduction to @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.QhZgmBrdLAGwYy5c.JournalEntryPage.KGXiKFUWrPgb7wsx]{Movement and Flanking} mechanics.

The Baisaz have formidable momentum and power in their charge. The Baisaz will charge a target using their Tusk Charge while using their movement or any remaining action to regain separation from their target to charge again.

Both Huiana and Baisaz are weak against damage to their @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.gszlBVQ5fGh3y0I6.JournalEntryPage.FmmADsI9qo1uIIT3]{Morale}. When the beasts become broken they will flee the arena, retreating down the nearest tunnel into the catacombs below. This initial challenge can serve as a learning experince that demoralizing your foes is a useful path towards victory.

Advancement

The fight ends when all eight beasts have been defeated. The crowd is pleased with the party's performance, and the Commentator announces that the party will be returning tomorrow for another match.

When ready to proceed, characters should each use the Recover action to regain lost resources and all characters should gain a level, advancing to level 2 to face @UUID[.eQdArtcrGi4wobap]{Day Two - Hammer and Anvil}.

eQdArtcrGi4wobap.name: Day Two - Hammer and Anvil
eQdArtcrGi4wobap.text:
In the Day Two challenge, 4 Level 2 heroes face off against the gladiatorial duo of Hammer and Anvil (Challenge 9).

  • @UUID[Actor.XA9W38PGmAs3ZLDa]{Hammer} (Level 3 Elite)

  • @UUID[Actor.KSoJR8uwT5Qzka7p]{Anvil} (Level 3 Elite)

Protagonist Threat: 2 × 4 = 8

Adversary Threat: 4 × 2 = 8

Encounter Difficulty: Deadly

Introduction

"It's a beautiful day in the Ring of Valor, and it's looking like we're in for a treat. Today's match marks the return of that deadly duo, the giants of the game, the terrible two: Hammer and Anvil."

The announcer pauses as the crowd roars before continuing: "What a welcome! You can just hear how eager the fans are to see these two in action again. Let's see if our new contenders can stand up to the challenge!"

The party is instructed to gather in front of the tunnel on the west side of the arena. Once the party is in position, Hammer and Anvil emerge from the tunnel on the opposite east side and the battle begins!

Tactics

Hammer and Anvil are a pair of adversaries which fight as a coordinated team.

Anvil's tactics primarily focus on trying to get close and grapple an enemy in order to create opportunities for Hammer to attack. Anvil will use Hammer Toss to get Hammer quickly into the fray and then use Wrestler to restrain enemies and Heavy Strike to deliver punishing blows.

Hammer is a skirmisher, moving in and out of combat to capture opportunities to unleash a devastating sequence of dual-wield attacks using Flurry or using a Strike + Offhand Strike combo. Any enemies that attempt to disengage, Hammer will subdue using Hamstring.

Advancement

The fight ends when both Hammer and Anvil have been defeated. The crowd is pleased with the party's performance, and the Commentator announces that the party will be returning tomorrow for another match.

The party is given a chance to rest, use the Recover action, and gain a level advancing to Level 3 to face @UUID[.v5EIDeTtHdQ7Wb5J]{Day Three - The Skeletal Army}.

v5EIDeTtHdQ7Wb5J.name: Day Three - The Skeletal Army
v5EIDeTtHdQ7Wb5J.text:
In the third challenge, 4 Level 3 heroes face off against the necromancer Orivech and his skeleton army!

  • @UUID[Actor.JuobjWohGACVeoyn]{Orivech} (Level 3 Boss)

    • Summoned @UUID[Compendium.crucible.summons.Actor.56puGK932Qc0cowe]{Creation of Death} (Level 1 Minion)

  • 6x @UUID[Actor.aQkmEcwfImmdUINF]{Skeletal Spearman} (Level 1 Minion)

  • 6x @UUID[Actor.7jL3UmgXbqxXKClM]{Skeletal Archer} (Level 1 Minion)

Protagonist Threat: 3 × 4 = 12

Adversary Threat: 6 + (½ × 6) + (½ × 6) = 12

Encounter Difficulty: Deadly

Introduction

For this challenge the party is instructed to assemble with their backs to the cliff on the North side of the arena.

"Welcome back - one and all - to the Ring of Valor for day three of our gripping gauntlet! Today we celebrate the reenactment of one of the historic battles of our history. These few brave champions, their backs to the edge of oblivion, facing down against the dread necromancer Orivech and his skeletal army!"

The crowd roars in eager anticipation as Orivech and his skeletal minions emerge from the south stairs and enter the arena.

Orivech and the skeletons emerge from the south entrance and array themselves in a battle formation before the encounter begins!

Tactics

Orivech will play defensively and rely upon his legion of skeletons to subdue his enemies. As a Boss enemy, Orivech has 10 Action per round and will use the Compose inflection on most spells in order to conserve Focus and will spend leftover Action on Recover Focus.

Orivech' tactics revolve around using the Create gesture to conjure more @UUID[Compendium.crucible.summons.Actor.56puGK932Qc0cowe]{Creation of Death} minions. Orivech can sustain up to 3 such minions at a time because of the Conjurer talent. When threatened directly he will use the Push inflection to force enemies backwards.

The Skeletal Archers will Strike to focus fire at whichever target Orivech designates, using Evasive Shot to reposition themselves. The Skeletal Spearman will rush forward to engage enemy fighters and block their path, trying to trip them with Leg Sweep.

Advancement

The fight ends when Orivech is defeated. When the necromancer falls, his skeletal minions disintegrate to dust alongside him. The crowd is pleased with the party's performance, and the Commentator announces that the party will be returning tomorrow for another match.

The party is given a chance to rest, use the Recover action, and gain a level advancing to Level 4. All heroes may also increase the quality of their equipped Weapons to Fine. After resting, the gauntlet continues with @UUID[.hEpGF7rbNFVUMm86]{Day Four - Koy Rent}.

hEpGF7rbNFVUMm86.name: Day Four - Koy Rent
hEpGF7rbNFVUMm86.text:
In this fourth challenge, 4 level 4 heroes square off against the lycanthropic menace Koy Rent.

  • @UUID[Actor.3sGYsiKtgYLLkadw]{Koy Rent} (Level 7 Boss)

Protagonist Threat: 4 × 4 = 16

Adversary Threat: 14

Encounter Difficulty: Difficult

Introduction

For this challenge, the party assembles on the east side of the Arena.

"Today's match is a special one- featuring the return of a retired champion in a one-day-only exhibition! Folks, you know him, you love him, he's here, he's there, he is EV-ERY-WHERE!--- Koy Rent! Rent left the ring after a grievous injury, cheered off the field of victory by an understanding crowd. With him back in the games we have to wonder: will he climb to champion or will he fall to these new contenders?"

Koy Rent enters the arena from the West entrance and immediately attacks!

Tactics

Koy Rent is a formidable fighter. As a Level 7 Boss with significant Health and Morale pools, the party will have little hope of withstanding his onslaught in direct melee combat.

Rent will use Ferocious Howl to inflict the Frightened condition and move quickly to close distance into melee range with as many enemies as possible. Rent will use Flurry when facing a single target to subdue them quickly with a relentless onslaught of claw attacks, dealing additional bleeding damage through the Bloodletter talent.

The party cannot hope to withstand this onslaught in melee combat and will need to think carefully about how to slow Koy Rent down.

Advancement

The fight ends when Koy Rent is defeated. The crowd is pleased with the party's performance, and the Commentator announces that the party will be returning tomorrow for another match.

The party is given a chance to rest, use the Recover action, and gain a level; advancing to Level 5. All heroes may also increase the quality of their equipped Armor to Fine. The party returns the next day to face @UUID[.sISxZXCLNvpjkY02]{Day Five - Void Harbingers}.

sISxZXCLNvpjkY02.name: Day Five - Void Harbingers
sISxZXCLNvpjkY02.text:
In this challenge, 4 Level 5 heroes face off against a trio of Void Harbingers:

  • @UUID[Actor.YVvIKp7fUIduZchE]{Harbinger of Fear} (L4 Elite)

  • @UUID[Actor.TZT7ybsmI8yV5hWg]{Harbinger of Disease} (L4 Elite)

  • @UUID[Actor.CTpEm0WlmFAAosBD]{Harbinger of Madness} (L4 Elite)

Protagonist Threat: 4 × 5 = 20

Adversary Threat: 3 × 6 = 18

Encounter Difficulty: Deadly

Introduction

"Tonight we're in for some true excitement as the summoners have conjured a new challenge from realms beyond the umbral veil! Ladies and gentlemen, from the darkest recesses and liminal spaces beyond the edge of reality, welcome to the Ring of Valor: the Void Harbingers!"

Tactics

The Harbinger of Fear is a mobile predator that feasts on fearful thoughts. It will use Ethereal Warp to move freely about the battlefield and Eldritch Emanataion to inflict fear on groups of enemies. Once it has isolated a frightened enemy it will Strike with it's Psychic Maw.

The Harbinger of Disease is a bearer of pestilence that inflicts the Diseased condition using it's Pestilent Lash ability. This Harbinger also has spellcasting ability which it will use to further sap life and morale, targeting groups of enemies with the Pulse gesture or individual targets using Influence.

The Harbinger of Madness is a psychological predator which will close to melee range before using the Mind Flay ability against groups of enemies or Devour Thoughts against a single foe.

Advancement

The fight ends when all three Harbingers are defeated. The crowd is pleased with the party's performance, and the Commentator announces that the party will be returning tomorrow for another match.

The party is given a chance to rest, use the Recover action, and gain a level; advancing to Level 6. All heroes may also increase the quality of their equipped Armor to Fine. The party returns the next day to face @UUID[.UxIXSvvJCdqx2Tar]{Day Six - Mirror Match}.

UxIXSvvJCdqx2Tar.name: Day Six - Mirror Match
UxIXSvvJCdqx2Tar.text:
In this final challenge, 4 Level 6 heroes come head-to-head with a rival adventuring party comprised of 4 Level 6 heroes.

  • @UUID[Actor.iLUfMcYjAbZFY4CJ]{Duurath} (Level 6)

  • @UUID[Actor.0crVYYsPvV9KDEJ2]{Belladonna} (Level 6)

  • @UUID[Actor.2lvTCCOj4dnBI774]{Eliorwen} (Level 6)

  • @UUID[Actor.Il4NDaNBdHNcjJ9d]{Kagura} (Level 6)

Protagonist Threat: 4 × 6 = 24

Adversary Threat: 4 × 6 = 24

Encounter Difficulty: Deadly

Introduction

"Well, well… your champions have proven themselves against all of the formidable adversaries which this arena had to offer, so it's time to pit them against the storied veterans and champions of a past competition. Prepare yourselves for a battle of champions!"

This is an especially difficult challenge because all four opposing heroes are individually optimized and work well as a team.

Tactics

Each of the opponents in this challenge functions as a heroic protagonist with their own array of talents, actions, and equipment.

Duurath

Duurath is a dangerous melee combatant with high Engagement, strong physical defense, and the Dread Lord signature talent which demoralizes and frightens foes. Duurath will close on enemy combatants using Shield Charge and lock them down using Cadence to deliver high damage or Counter Strike to retaliate when blocking incoming blows. Defensively, Duurath can use Kinetic Ward to protect himself from a chosen type of physical damage.

Belladonna

Belladonna is a cunning and elusive melee combatant with the Poisoner talent. At the beginning of the battle she will activate Poison Blades. She will use Distract against enemy spellcasters to sap their Focus, and Combat Medicine to restore the health of her allies. Belladonna will seek out more vulnerable enemy combatants, closing to melee range using Tumble if necessary and Flurry to apply rapid damage and poisoned conditions.

Eliorwen

Eliorwen is a deadly archer, infusing shots from her Longbow with lightning spells using her Arcane Archer talent. Eliorwen will identify a dangerous enemy and target them with Mark Prey to reduce their defenses for herself and her allies. She will use Precision Shot coupled with reduced cost Voltaic Arrow to deliver reliable sustained damage from a distance.

Kagura

Kagura is a versatile support character able to heal both mind and body of her allies. She will cast the Life rune using either the Influence, Pulse, or Ray gestures to trigger additional healing from her Mender talent. Kagura can sustain healing nearly indefinitely through thoughtful use of the Compose inflection as well as Conserve Effort. Kagura avoids direct confrontation and instead will disengage from combat and seek protection from her allies.

Advancement

The fight ends when all four adversaries are defeated. The crowd is thrilled with the party's performance and celebrates them as eternal champions of the Ring of Valor. There are not any more planned events in the Ring of Valor at this time, but please see @UUID[.aNlzMnfUkwpLrSox]{Further Challenges} if you wish to continue testing by improvising new challenges for the party to face.

aNlzMnfUkwpLrSox.name: Further Challenges
aNlzMnfUkwpLrSox.text:
Thank you for completing the Crucible Playtest. We hope that you and your players enjoyed the testing experience. For further challenges to evaluate the system, we recommend the following:

  1. Repeat the @UUID[.UxIXSvvJCdqx2Tar]{Day Six - Mirror Match} challenge but with different combinations of Level 6 Pregen characters as adversaries.

  2. Create your own @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.v1dqTT3NI35lFNxM]{Adversaries} by testing out the initial system of Taxonomies and Archetypes.

Please consider taking the time to @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.5SgXrAKS2EnqVggJ.JournalEntryPage.4Ggutuh9uzhcEXSK]{Provide Feedback} which can help us further develop and improve this new role-playing game system.

tuskCharge000000.name: Tusk Charge
tuskCharge000000.description: The Boar lowers its head and charges with frantic speed, it's tusks protruding from beneath a drooling gullet.

tuskCharge.name: Tusk Charge
tuskCharge.description: Charge in a direct line up to your Stride and make a Strike against the first creature you encounter. If successful, the target is knocked @Condition[prone].

archetype.name: Tusker
archetype.description: Beasts that fight using their own mass, momentum, and sharpened tusks.

taxonomy.name: Boar
taxonomy.description: Mammals with thick hide, dangerous tusks, and a powerful low-seated center of mass.

packhunter000000.name: Pack Hunter
packhunter000000.description:
This creature is a pack hunter, relying on its allies to flank and harrass a target to render it exposed to further harm.

This creature doubles number of Boons awarded from attacking a @Condition[flanked] enemy.

taxonomy.name: Hyena
taxonomy.description: Mammals from the hyena family. Hyenas are carnivorous pack hunters with powerful necks and jaws.

description.public: Toughened skins from large beasts or monsters, these rugged armors are worn by hunters and wildfolk, offering durable—but crude—defense in the field.
A gnarled length of heavy wood, sometimes studded with iron, the greatclub is a crude but fearsome weapon is dangerous even in untrained hands.

powerfulphysique.name: Powerful Physique
powerfulphysique.description: You can wield weapons with the Slow trait and wear Armor with the Bulky trait without suffering Banes to your Initiative rolls.

legsweep00000000.name: Leg Sweep
legsweep00000000.description: You use a weapon which scales using Strength to sweep your enemy off balance, swinging low to knock them from their feet.

legSweep.name: Leg Sweep
legSweep.description: You make a Strike attack with your mainhand weapon. This technique is Difficult to execute and deals reduced damage, but if successful renders your target @Condition[prone].

concussiveblows0.name: Concussive Blows
concussiveblows0.description:
Your physical power wielding melee weapons which deal Bludgeoning damage can cause the @Condition[staggered] condition on Critical Hits which deal damage to Health.

The @Condition[staggered] effect lasts for 1 round and reduces your target's maximum Action by 2.

stronggrip000000.name: Strong Grip
stronggrip000000.description:
Your grasp of your weaponry is firm and unyielding. While wielding a two-handed weapon that scales with Strength you may cast spells which require two hands, and attempts to Disarm you are made with +2 Banes.

Additionally, you may wield a one-handed Heavy weapon in your off-hand.

hammertoss000000.name: Hammer Toss
hammertoss000000.description: Anvil grabs Hammer and hurls the Orc headlong into the fray.

hammerToss.name: Hammer Toss
hammerToss.description: Hammer grabs Anvil and hurls him up to 10 spaces, dealing damage in an area of effect where the Orc warchief lands.

heavyWeaponTrain.name: Heavy Weapon Training
heavyWeaponTrain.description: You know how to use a heavy weapon to deliver punishing blows, putting your entire strength behind every swing. You are Trained with all weapons in the Heavy and Balanced categories.

heavyStrike.name: Heavy Strike
heavyStrike.description: You unleash a powerful Strike with your mainhand weapon. The attack is slower to execute, but is Empowered to deliver additional damage.

unarmedCombatTra.name: Unarmed Combat Training
unarmedCombatTra.description: You are familiar with basic martial arts and hand-to-hand combat. You know how to subdue or restrain opponents using your physical Strength. You are Trained with weapons in the Unarmed category.

grapple.name: Grapple
grapple.description: You attempt to physically restrain or subdue an opponent. Perform a Athletics skill attack against an adjacent target. If successful, both you and your target are @Condition[restrained] for 1 Round.

archetype.name: Grappler
archetype.description: Fighters who specialize in physically restraining their adversaries and rendering them susceptible to further attacks.

taxonomy.name: Ogre
taxonomy.description: Hulking giantkin which are reknowned for their brute strength and direct problem-solving approach.

description.public: Compact and deadly, the hand axe is a one-handed chopper with a short haft and sharp blade, ideal for throwing or close-quarters strikes where speed outmatches reach.
Overlapping metal plates sewn or riveted onto a leather or cloth backing, scale mail resembles the hide of a dragon and protects well against cuts and stabs—though it's noisy and inflexible.

skirmisher000000.name: Skirmisher
skirmisher000000.description: You are adept at entering and exiting the fray. When moving out of the Engagement radius of an enemy, that enemy has 2 Banes to any @Action[default reactiveStrike] against you.

flurry0000000000.name: Flurry
flurry0000000000.description: A martial technique using two weapons to overwhelm a single target with a relentless sequence of attacks.

flurry.name: Flurry
flurry.description: You Strike twice with each weapon, but each strike is Difficult.

hamstring0000000.name: Hamstring
hamstring0000000.description: You use a slashing weapon to target the legs of an enemy and cripple their movement.

hamstring.name: Hamstring
hamstring.description: You make Strike attack which is Difficult, but if successful, inflicts the @Condition[slowed] condition for 3 Rounds.

heavyWeaponTrain.name: Heavy Weapon Training
heavyWeaponTrain.description: You know how to use a heavy weapon to deliver punishing blows, putting your entire strength behind every swing. You are Trained with all weapons in the Heavy and Balanced categories.

heavyStrike.name: Heavy Strike
heavyStrike.description: You unleash a powerful Strike with your mainhand weapon. The attack is slower to execute, but is Empowered to deliver additional damage.

dualWield0000000.name: Dual Wield
dualWield0000000.description: You are adept at fighting with two weapons simultaneously. You can weave attacks together to strike more rapidly than possible with a single weapon.

offhandStrike.name: Offhand Strike
offhandStrike.description: Immediately after you perform a basic Strike with your mainhand weapon, you make a reduced-cost follow-up Strike with your offhand weapon.

description.public: A bastard sword, also known as a hand-and-a-half sword, is a versatile weapon with a straight, double-edged blade around 40 inches long. This weapon is forged for both single-handed agility and two-handed power.

lightWeaponTrain.name: Light Weapon Training
lightWeaponTrain.description: You know how to wield light weapons fluidly with a high degree of maneuverability and grace in combat. You are Trained with all weapons in the Light and Balanced categories.

lunge.name: Lunge
lunge.description:
You dart forward nimbly, making a strike with sudden and unexpected swiftness to perform a Strike with a weapon which scales using Dexterity against a single target, with an increased range of +2 feet.

The attack is Difficult, but you do not move from your current position nor does this attack provoke Disengagement.

defensiveroll000.name: Defensive Roll
defensiveroll000.description: You are a nimble skirmisher, always in movement to stay one step ahead of your enemies in combat.

defensiveRoll.name: Defensive Roll
defensiveRoll.condition: You Dodge an incoming melee Strike.
defensiveRoll.description: When you Dodge a melee attack you can expend Focus to leap into a defensive roll, moving up to your Size in any direction.

archetype.name: Skirmisher
archetype.description: A relentless and determined melee combatant that uses a mix of agility and power to subdue foes.

taxonomy.name: Orcish
taxonomy.description: Your birth was marked by the stars and traditions of a proud and enduring people. Your tall and well-toned body and natural propensity for toughness has origins amid a people exposed to the relentless struggle of a harsh northern clime. Your people are known for their strength and resilience above all else.

description.public: This macabre talisman invokes the fear and energies of death to aid spellcaft or afflict enemies with corrupting influence.
A base of leather reinforced with small metal studs or riveted plates, this armor strikes a balance between mobility and modest protection against slashes.

gestureinfluence.name: Gesture: Influence
gestureinfluence.description:
You intensify the arcane power of a Rune into a concentrated direct contact which is generally a more powerful evolution of the basic Touch gesture.

The Influence gesture scales using Presence and targets a single adjacent creature. It deals 10 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

inflectioncompos.name: Inflection: Compose
inflectioncompos.description: Enhance a spell by taking extra time in its formation, reducing other resource costs in exchange. The Compose inflection reduces the Focus cost of a spell by 1 while increasing its Action cost by 1 in exchange.

gesturecreate000.name: Gesture: Create
gesturecreate000.description:
You coalesce arcane power into tangible form, manifesting a Sprite which appears within 10 feet and joins Combat at Initiative 1. Your Sprite is a Minion of half your own Level.

The Create gesture scales with Wisdom and the Sprite survives for 6 Rounds. You may only have one active Sprite, casting another spell using the Create gesture replaces your previous Sprite. This gesture requires 2 Hands to cast and has a base cost of 4 Action and 1 Focus.

Playtest Notes

Not all Runes have a Sprite actor defined yet. Runes that do not yet have a defined Creation will — for now — manifest a Flame Sprite.

gesturearrow0000.name: Gesture: Arrow
gesturearrow0000.description:
You hurl a projectile imbued with the magical power of a Rune at a distant target.

The Arrow gesture scales using Intellect and targets a single creature up to a distance of 60 feet, dealing 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

conjurer00000000.name: Conjurer
conjurer00000000.description: You are a master of Conjuration and the Gesture of Creation to manifest arcane energy as physical form. You can maintain up to 3 such creations simultaneously rather than only one.

inflectionpush00.name: Inflection: Push
inflectionpush00.description: Empower a spell to repel affected creatures away from the caster. Creatures affected by a spell with the Push inflection are forcibly moved a distance away from the spellcaster equal to the Ability Bonus that applied to the Spell, potentially colliding with walls or other movement-blocking obstacles.

talismanWeaponTr.name: Talisman Weapon Training
talismanWeaponTr.description: You understand the arcane usage of talismans, orbs, foci, or other similar implements to channel magic or empower spellcraft. You are Trained with weapons in the Talisman categories.

refocus.name: Refocus
refocus.description:
You use your equipped Talisman to attempt to regain some Focus. You perform a Harmless Strike against your own Rallying threshold.

On a success you recover +1 Focus if using a one-handed Talisman and +2 Focus if using a two-handed Talisman. On a critical success the amount of Focus recovered increases by an additional +1.

intercept0000000.name: Intercept
intercept0000000.description: You protect your allies, intercepting blows that might otherwise be directed towards your companions.

intercept.name: Intercept
intercept.condition: An enemy moves into or through your Engagement radius.
intercept.description:
You intercept the path of an enemy which enters your Engagement radius, immediately moving up to your Stride to interpose yourself and block their path.

If the enemy moves out of your Engagement radius or attacks any other creature during their turn, you may make a @Action[default reactiveStrike] against them.

Playtest Notes

The interruption of enemy movement is not yet automated.

gestureray000000.name: Gesture: Ray
gestureray000000.description:
You funnel the arcane power of a Rune into a point and project it outwards in a beam.

The Ray gesture scales using Wisdom and produces a line that is 1 foot wide and 30 feet long originating from the spellcaster, dealing 6 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. The gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 4 Action and 1 Focus.

runeOblivion0000.name: Rune: Oblivion
runeOblivion0000.description:
A chaotic force of destruction and annihilation of existence. The Oblivion rune governs unmaking of matter or decoherence of spirit.

The Oblivion rune scales using Intellect, targets Willpower, and deals Void damage to Morale. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Soul.

erase.name: Erase
erase.description:
Your command of the Rune of Oblivion allows you to unravel tiny holes in the fabric of existence, producing one of the following effects:

  • Disintegrate a non-magical object you hold smaller than a 6-inch cube, sundering it to a fine particulate dust of its component elements.

  • Anesthetize the ability to feel emotion from yourself or a willing target that you touch, causing it to enter a placid, stoic, or dispassionate state. This effect can be maintained as long as you make no further Action.

  • Subdue the potency of a light source, causing its visible radius to be reduced by half for as long as you maintain physical contact with it. Only one light source may be dampened in this way at a given time.

Erase may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

runeSoul00000000.name: Rune: Soul
runeSoul00000000.description:
An orderly force of creation and spiritual essence. The Soul rune governs the fundamental procession of souls through life and death and relates to matters of sapience, personality, and mental health.

The Soul rune scales using Presence and provides Restoration of Morale. In special circumstances it may be used to inflict Psychic damage opposed by Willpower. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Oblivion.

evoke.name: Evoke
evoke.description:
Your command of the Rune of Soul allows you to facilitate basic forms of spiritual influence, producing one of the following effects:

  • Enable yourself or another willing person to revisit a core memory of a moment from their past up to one minute in duration as if it happened recently.

  • Identify a negative spiritual condition that is affecting a person such as @Condition[broken], @Condition[frightened], @Condition[confused], or @Condition[insane].

  • Create a momentary spiritual connection with another willing creature that allows them to recognize an idea which can be expressed as a single word.

Uses of Evoke may only affect yourself or another creature which you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

runeDeath0000000.name: Rune: Death
runeDeath0000000.description:
The orderly force of destruction, responsible for the corruption of all biological matter. The Death rune governs decay and destruction.

The Death rune scales using Presence, targets Fortitude, and deals Corruption damage to Health. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Life.

ennervate.name: Ennervate
ennervate.description:
Your command of the Rune of Death allows for basic communion with the dead and for rudimentary manipulation of unholy forces, producing one of the following effects:

  • Spread decay over an object no larger than a 1-foot cube, causing plants to wither, metallic objects to rust, wood to become rotten, food to grow foul, or a corpse to rapidly decompose. Magical objects are typically unaffected.

  • Cause a corpse which has been dead for less than seven days or otherwise preserved to perform a lifeless reenactment of its final moments. Its movements imitate those that occurred during the creature's final 30 seconds of life. You have no control over the creature nor can it communicate in any other way.

  • Hasten the death of a willing creature that is currently dying, causing it to pass swiftly and peacefully.

Ennervate may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

description.public: This heavy tome is used as a repository of knowledge as well as an implement for spellcraft. In the hands of an arcane practitioner, it can project concussive blasts of force towards a target.

archetype.name: Occultist
archetype.description: Magic users who practice spellcraft using otherworldly and eldritch forces.

taxonomy.name: Human
taxonomy.description: Found amid countless conditions and far-flung places, you were born an ever-adaptable human. Tall or short, thin, muscular, or rotund, your physical appearance is nothing if not varied. Humans are most known for a genetic predisposition toward determination, with traditions that drive a stubborn will to survive.

description.public: Compact and quick to draw, the shortbow excels in rapid, close-quarters archery and skirmishes, favored by scouts, hunters, and swift-footed raiders.

precisionshot000.name: Precision Shot
precisionshot000.description: You take time to steady your aim and target the weakest point of a foe. You may only get one shot, but you make it count.

precisionShot.name: Precision Shot
precisionShot.description: You steady your aim and fire a single accurate shot.

evasiveshot00000.name: Evasive Shot
evasiveshot00000.description: You are an expert at firing shots with ranged weaponry while evading enemy attacks.

evasiveShot.name: Evasive Shot
evasiveShot.description: After performing a ranged weapon attack, you may move up to half your Stride for free.

projectileWeapon.name: Projectile Weapon Training
projectileWeapon.description: You have a basic education in archery and other projectile weaponry. You are no longer treated as Untrained with weapons in the Projectile categories.

quickDraw.name: Quick Draw
quickDraw.description: You can loose a shot under pressure, although with decreased accuracy. You perform a Strike that is Difficult, but has a reduced Action cost.

restlessDead0000.name: Restless Dead
restlessDead0000.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{creature}'s life is sustained by necromantic magic or otherworldly forces. When it would be considered @Condition[dead] it is instead @Condition[incapacitated].

After the conclusion of combat, the @ref[actor.name]{creature} may begin to perform the Recover action, regaining consciousness after the recovery is complete. Recovery in this fashion may be prevented in one of the following ways:

  • The creature was incapacitated by a type of damage for which it is Vulnerable.

  • The magical forces which caused it to rise as undead are disrupted, countered, or otherwise dispelled.

  • The creature's body is destroyed to a degree that it can no longer maintain its physical form.

archetype.name: Archer
archetype.description: Ranged combatants with training is the use of bows.

taxonomy.name: Skeleton
taxonomy.description: Malevolent undying creatures brought to life by necromancy, created from the skeletal remains of long-dead humanoids. Driven by unholy forces beyond their control, @ref[name] rarely exist of their own accord, and are often encountered as the minions of evil spellcasters and greater undead.

description.public: A weapon of reach and rhythm, the spear features a long shaft tipped with steel, perfect for holding the line or launching with deadly force from behind a shield wall.

bulwark000000000.name: Bulwark
bulwark000000000.description:
You have expertise in using a Shield to defend yourself and others.

Once per Turn while you have a Shield equipped, you may use the Defend action at a reduced cost of 1 Action Point.

armoredefficienc.name: Armored Efficiency
armoredefficienc.description: You are trained in wearing the heaviest types of armor while still retaining mobility. You are able to use a free Movement action once per Turn while wearing Heavy armor.

legsweep00000000.name: Leg Sweep
legsweep00000000.description: You use a weapon which scales using Strength to sweep your enemy off balance, swinging low to knock them from their feet.

legSweep.name: Leg Sweep
legSweep.description: You make a Strike attack with your mainhand weapon. This technique is Difficult to execute and deals reduced damage, but if successful renders your target @Condition[prone].

lightWeaponTrain.name: Light Weapon Training
lightWeaponTrain.description: You know how to wield light weapons fluidly with a high degree of maneuverability and grace in combat. You are Trained with all weapons in the Light and Balanced categories.

lunge.name: Lunge
lunge.description:
You dart forward nimbly, making a strike with sudden and unexpected swiftness to perform a Strike with a weapon which scales using Dexterity against a single target, with an increased range of +2 feet.

The attack is Difficult, but you do not move from your current position nor does this attack provoke Disengagement.

restlessDead0000.name: Restless Dead
restlessDead0000.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{creature}'s life is sustained by necromantic magic or otherworldly forces. When it would be considered @Condition[dead] it is instead @Condition[incapacitated].

After the conclusion of combat, the @ref[actor.name]{creature} may begin to perform the Recover action, regaining consciousness after the recovery is complete. Recovery in this fashion may be prevented in one of the following ways:

  • The creature was incapacitated by a type of damage for which it is Vulnerable.

  • The magical forces which caused it to rise as undead are disrupted, countered, or otherwise dispelled.

  • The creature's body is destroyed to a degree that it can no longer maintain its physical form.

heavyWeaponTrain.name: Heavy Weapon Training
heavyWeaponTrain.description: You know how to use a heavy weapon to deliver punishing blows, putting your entire strength behind every swing. You are Trained with all weapons in the Heavy and Balanced categories.

heavyStrike.name: Heavy Strike
heavyStrike.description: You unleash a powerful Strike with your mainhand weapon. The attack is slower to execute, but is Empowered to deliver additional damage.

archetype.name: Fighter
archetype.description: Hardened melee combatants expert at weilding one-handed weaponry, shield, and heavy armor.

taxonomy.name: Skeleton
taxonomy.description: Malevolent undying creatures brought to life by necromancy, created from the skeletal remains of long-dead humanoids. Driven by unholy forces beyond their control, @ref[name] rarely exist of their own accord, and are often encountered as the minions of evil spellcasters and greater undead.

thickskin0000000.name: Thick Skin
thickskin0000000.description: Your physical toughness makes you more resistant to harm. You gain +2 Resistance to Bludgeoning, Slashing, and Piercing damage.

ferociousHowl000.name: Ferocious Howl
ferociousHowl000.description: The Werewolf lets out a blood-curdling howl that stops you in your tracks with fear.

ferociousHowl.name: Ferocious Howl
ferociousHowl.description: You make an Intimidation skill attack against the Willpower defense of all enemies within 30 feet, dealing Void damage to Morale and causing the Frightened condition for 3 Rounds.

intimidator00000.name: Intimidator
intimidator00000.description: You specialize in exerting your intimidating presence to break the morale of your foes.

intimidate.name: Intimidate
intimidate.description: You physically intimidate an enemy that is within your engagement range, performing an Intimidation skill attack against your target. On a success they sustain Void damage to Morale.

bloodfrenzy00000.name: Blood Frenzy
bloodfrenzy00000.description: Your battle lust spurs you to feats of heightened action. When you achieve a Critical Hit that deals damage to Health you immediately gain +1 Action. This benefit may only happen once per Round.

lesserregenerati.name: Lesser Regeneration
lesserregenerati.description: Your prodigious hardiness conveys a supernatural capability to recover from wounds quickly. At the start of your turn if you are not @Condition[weakened] you gain +1 Health.

bloodletter00000.name: Bloodletter
bloodletter00000.description:
Your precision with weapons which deal Slashing or Piercing damage can cause the @Condition[bleeding] condition on Critical Hits which deal damage to Health.

The @Condition[bleeding] effect lasts for 3 rounds and deals your Dexterity score as additional damage to Health.

ferociousleap000.name: Ferocious Leap
ferociousleap000.description: You leap powerfully into battle to deliver a punishing blow to a nearby enemy with your mainhand weapon.

ferociousLeap.name: Ferocious Leap
ferociousLeap.description: You leap up to 10 feet and perform a Strike against an enemy within melee range of where you land. Your movement ignores difficult terrain and is not blocked by enemy creatures.

naturalWeaponPro.name: Natural Weapon Proficiency
naturalWeaponPro.description: You have a fluent familiarity with the use of natural bodily weapons. You gain the Journeyman training rank and a +1 Skill Bonus with weapons in the Natural category.

berserker0000000.name: Berserker
berserker0000000.description: You revel in the thrill of combat, hurling yourself into the fray with reckless abandon.

berserkerRage.name: Berserker Rage
berserkerRage.condition: You have suffered damage to your Health pool since your last turn in Combat.
berserkerRage.description: You become @Condition[enraged]. While Enraged you deal 4 additional damage on all melee attacks. You may attempt to end the effect on your own turn by succeeding on a Willpower test against a DC of 20. The effect ends automatically when Combat is concluded.

frenziedClaws000.name: Frenzied Claws
frenziedClaws000.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} launches into a frenzied sequence of wild swipes with its claws.

frenziedClaws.name: Frenzied Claws
frenziedClaws.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} attacks four times with its claws against a single target.

pouncingStrike00.name: Pouncing Strike
pouncingStrike00.description: This creature lunges forward, putting its whole weight behind a leaping strike.

pouncingStrike.name: Pouncing Strike
pouncingStrike.description:
This attack may be used after a Move that brings the @ref[actor.name]{creature} at least 10 feet closer to its target. If the creature was above the target, this attack gains +1 Boon per 10 feet of elevation decrease in that movement.

If this attack is a Critical Hit, the target of the attack is immediately knocked @Condition[prone].

heavyWeaponTrain.name: Heavy Weapon Training
heavyWeaponTrain.description: You know how to use a heavy weapon to deliver punishing blows, putting your entire strength behind every swing. You are Trained with all weapons in the Heavy and Balanced categories.

heavyStrike.name: Heavy Strike
heavyStrike.description: You unleash a powerful Strike with your mainhand weapon. The attack is slower to execute, but is Empowered to deliver additional damage.

archetype.name: Berserker
archetype.description: A rage-fueled warrior which prefers two-handed attacks using Heavy weapons.

taxonomy.name: Werewolf
taxonomy.description: Lycanthropic shapeshifters who walk as men but take wolven form.

description.public: Some void chitin description.

pestilentlash000.name: Pestilent Lash
pestilentlash000.description: The Harbinger lashes out in a wide arc with a venomous and disease-ridden tongue.

pestilentLash.name: Pestilent Lash
pestilentLash.description: Lash all enemies within 10 feet in a 120 degree arc, inflicting Poison damage and the Diseased condition on hit.

gestureinfluence.name: Gesture: Influence
gestureinfluence.description:
You intensify the arcane power of a Rune into a concentrated direct contact which is generally a more powerful evolution of the basic Touch gesture.

The Influence gesture scales using Presence and targets a single adjacent creature. It deals 10 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

gesturepulse0000.name: Gesture: Pulse
gesturepulse0000.description:
Expel the arcane power of a Rune in a radius that travels outward with you at its center.

The Pulse gesture scales using Presence and produces an emanation with 10 foot radius, dealing 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. The gesture requires 2 Hands to cast and has a base cost of 5 Action and 2 Focus.

Playtest Notes

This talent is currently placed at a Tier 4 node. It will eventually only be attainable at a higher level (probably Level 6 required). It is currently available "early" for testing.

inflectionpull00.name: Inflection: Pull
inflectionpull00.description: Empower a spell to attract affected creatures toward the caster. Creatures affected by a spell with the Pull inflection move are forcibly moved a distance towards the spellcaster equal to the Ability Bonus that applied to the Spell, potentially colliding with walls or other movement-blocking obstacles.

runeOblivion0000.name: Rune: Oblivion
runeOblivion0000.description:
A chaotic force of destruction and annihilation of existence. The Oblivion rune governs unmaking of matter or decoherence of spirit.

The Oblivion rune scales using Intellect, targets Willpower, and deals Void damage to Morale. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Soul.

  • Anesthetize the ability to feel emotion from yourself or a willing target that you touch, causing it to enter a placid, stoic, or dispassionate state. This effect can be maintained as long as you make no further Action.

  • Subdue the potency of a light source, causing its visible radius to be reduced by half for as long as you maintain physical contact with it. Only one light source may be dampened in this way at a given time.

ennervate.description:

  • Hasten the death of a willing creature that is currently dying, causing it to pass swiftly and peacefully.

Ennervate may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

description.public: Some void chitin description.

eldritchemanatio.name: Eldritch Emanation
eldritchemanatio.description: The Harbinger of Fear projects a cone of malevolent despair from its blossoming maw.

eldritchEmanation.name: Eldritch Emanation
eldritchEmanation.description: Project a cone attack up to 10 feet dealing Psychic damage to Morale and causing the Frightened condition on hit for 1 Round.

etherealwarp0000.name: Ethereal Warp
etherealwarp0000.description: The Harbinger fades out of reality, becoming incorporeal for a few moments before re-appearing in a location up to 6 spaces away.

etherealWarp.name: Ethereal Warp
etherealWarp.description: Disappear and re-emerge up to 30 Feet away from your current location. This movement does not allow for any Disengagement Attack.

description.public: Some void chitin description.

devourthoughts00.name: Devour Thoughts
devourthoughts00.description: The Harbinger of Madness focuses on a single target, latching onto them with multiple tendrils.

devourThoughts.name: Devour Thoughts
devourThoughts.description: Lash onto a single enemy with multiple tendrils, dealing Weakened Psychic damage and inflicting the Stunned condition on a success.

mindflay00000000.name: Mind Flay
mindflay00000000.description: Flay nearby foes with a whirling lash of tentacles which inflict bludgeoning damage and cause psychological disorientation.

mindFlay.name: Mind Flay
mindFlay.description: Lash out with terrible tentacles against all nearby foes. Those hit by the attack become Disoriented for one Round.

archetype.name: Mindwarper
archetype.description: A hulking creature that destroys the sanity of those which behold it.

description.public: This mage staff is a talisman to assist with spellcraft or hurl gouts of arcane flame at enemies.
Ring mail features metal rings sewn onto a padded base, offering a compromise of less protection than heavier mail options in exchange for greater mobility.

inspireheroism00.name: Inspire Heroism
inspireheroism00.description: Your courageous presence inspires your nearby allies to strike with confidence.

inspireHeroism.name: Inspire Heroism
inspireHeroism.description: Each ally, excluding yourself, within 10 Feet gains +1 Boon to actions performed until the end of their next Turn.

gestureinfluence.name: Gesture: Influence
gestureinfluence.description:
You intensify the arcane power of a Rune into a concentrated direct contact which is generally a more powerful evolution of the basic Touch gesture.

The Influence gesture scales using Presence and targets a single adjacent creature. It deals 10 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

lightWeaponTrain.name: Light Weapon Training
lightWeaponTrain.description: You know how to wield light weapons fluidly with a high degree of maneuverability and grace in combat. You are Trained with all weapons in the Light and Balanced categories.

lunge.name: Lunge
lunge.description:
You dart forward nimbly, making a strike with sudden and unexpected swiftness to perform a Strike with a weapon which scales using Dexterity against a single target, with an increased range of +2 feet.

The attack is Difficult, but you do not move from your current position nor does this attack provoke Disengagement.

erase.description:

  • Subdue the potency of a light source, causing its visible radius to be reduced by half for as long as you maintain physical contact with it. Only one light source may be dampened in this way at a given time.

Erase may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

runeFlame0000000.name: Rune: Flame
runeFlame0000000.description:
The chaotic force of elemental, thermal energy. The Flame rune governs fire and heat.

The Flame rune scales using Intellect, targets Reflex, and deals Fire damage to Health. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Frost.

enkindle.name: Enkindle
enkindle.description:
Your command of the Rune of Flame allows you to manipulate fire and thermal energy in creative ways, producing one of the following effects:

  • Manifest a burst of elemental flame in one inch sphere which can ignite a candle, torch, or other flammable materials.

  • Imbue your body with momentary thermal shielding which provides you with immunity to fire damage on an immediately subsequent action that costs 1 Action or less.

  • Control the movement of flames within a small area, causing them to flicker, dance, or shift in an animated performance of light and shadow.

Enkindle may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

gesturearrow0000.name: Gesture: Arrow
gesturearrow0000.description:
You hurl a projectile imbued with the magical power of a Rune at a distant target.

The Arrow gesture scales using Intellect and targets a single creature up to a distance of 60 feet, dealing 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

ancestry.name: Devilkin
ancestry.description: You were born with unexpected magical influence over your creation. Your physical appearance shows tell-tale signs that the superstitious associate with planar beings- crimson flesh, ineffective wings or horns, reptilian eyes. Your dislike of light and preternatural resistance to fire does little to dissuade people from thinking you are an actual devil.

background.name: Performer
background.description: You were a travelling entertainer. You learned to be comfortable attending a variety of social functions, how to play to your audience, embellishing details of your performance to evoke particular emotional responses.

biography.public: Zarajah is a spirited Devilkin with a penchant for pyromancy who weaves dangerous and warding spells to control the battlefield. Zarajah aspires to obtain the War Mage signature Talent.

description.public: A layer of vertical metal strips riveted to a backing of leather or mail, splint armor offers strong limb protection while sacrificing some flexibility.

cadence000000000.name: Cadence
cadence000000000.description: You are drilled in performing sequences of melee attacks with rhythmic precision. When you Strike multiple times in sequence using a one-handed melee weapon you gain a stacking +1 Boon for each successive attack.

gesturearrow0000.name: Gesture: Arrow
gesturearrow0000.description:
You hurl a projectile imbued with the magical power of a Rune at a distant target.

The Arrow gesture scales using Intellect and targets a single creature up to a distance of 60 feet, dealing 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

spellblade000000.name: Spellblade
spellblade000000.description:
You are an arcane warrior who can weave together Strike and Spell relying on both martial and arcane techniques in battle. The physical strikes of your weaponry partially substitute for the somatic gestures of traditional spellcraft.

While wielding a Melee weapon as your mainhand weapon, spells you cast using Gesture: Strike benefit from your weapon's damage bonus.

Immediately after performing a Strike with a melee weapon, you may cast a spell with its Action cost reduced by 1.

stronggrip000000.name: Strong Grip
stronggrip000000.description:
Your grasp of your weaponry is firm and unyielding. While wielding a two-handed weapon that scales with Strength you may cast spells which require two hands, and attempts to Disarm you are made with +2 Banes.

Additionally, you may wield a one-handed Heavy weapon in your off-hand.

gesturestrike000.name: Gesture: Strike
gesturestrike000.description:
You empower a direct close-range attack with the arcane essence of a Rune, performing a Strike with your equipped weapon.

The Strike gesture scales using Strength and deal damage based on your used weapon but with the damage type of the incorporated Rune. This gesture does not require any free hand and has a base cost of 1 Focus in addition to the cost of your weapon Strike.

powerfulphysique.name: Powerful Physique
powerfulphysique.description: You can wield weapons with the Slow trait and wear Armor with the Bulky trait without suffering Banes to your Initiative rolls.

counterriposte00.name: Counter Riposte
counterriposte00.description: You are expert in translating a parried attack into a swift counter against your exposed enemy.

counterRiposte.name: Counter Riposte
counterRiposte.condition: You Parry an incoming melee Strike.
counterRiposte.description: When you defend against a melee attack with a Parry, you may react and expend Focus to retaliate with a reduced-cost Strike which is Accurate.

ruthlessmomentum.name: Ruthless Momentum
ruthlessmomentum.description: You relish the carnage you can cause in combat and continue to press the fray as each enemy falls.

ruthlessMomentum.name: Ruthless Momentum
ruthlessMomentum.condition: You incapacitate an enemy with a melee attack.
ruthlessMomentum.description: After defeating an enemy, you immediately move up to your Stride and Strike another foe that you pass next to or end your movement adjacent to.

lesserregenerati.name: Lesser Regeneration
lesserregenerati.description: Your prodigious hardiness conveys a supernatural capability to recover from wounds quickly. At the start of your turn if you are not @Condition[weakened] you gain +1 Health.

description.public: A polearm with a curved, sword-like blade affixed to the end of a long shaft, the glaive sweeps through foes in broad, arcing strikes.

athleticsNovice0.name: Athletics Novice
athleticsNovice0.description:
You have received training in basic athletics. You gain the Novice rank in the Athletics skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know whether a surface can support your weight or not, how to find handholds while climbing, and how to distribute your weight for buoyancy when swimming. You know how to run for distance, and how to pace yourself to avoid exhaustion.

intimidationNovi.name: Intimidation Novice
intimidationNovi.description:
You understand the fundamentals of how threats and coercion can achieve desired outcomes. You gain the Novice rank in the Intimidation skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know how to use simple displays of violence or overt threats to get others to follow your lead, but you aren't very subtle.

heavyWeaponTrain.name: Heavy Weapon Training
heavyWeaponTrain.description: You know how to use a heavy weapon to deliver punishing blows, putting your entire strength behind every swing. You are Trained with all weapons in the Heavy and Balanced categories.

heavyStrike.name: Heavy Strike
heavyStrike.description: You unleash a powerful Strike with your mainhand weapon. The attack is slower to execute, but is Empowered to deliver additional damage.

opportunisticspe.name: Opportunistic Spellcraft
opportunisticspe.description: Your quick thinking can weave magic to exploit brief windows of opportunity. You may make a Disengagement Attack using the Touch Gesture instead of a melee weapon attack.

awarenessNovice0.name: Awareness Novice
awarenessNovice0.description:
You have been trained in the basics of situational awareness, and are able to notice important details about your environment. You gain the Novice rank in the Awareness skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know to check for exits when you enter a room, and how to look for concealed weapons, hidden traps, and other threats. You know how to spot when you are being followed, and how to search for common hiding places.

athleticsJourney.name: Athletics Journeyman
athleticsJourney.description: You gain the Journeyman rank in the Athletics skill, providing a +1 Skill Bonus.

heavyWeaponProfi.name: Heavy Weapon Proficiency
heavyWeaponProfi.description: You have a fluent education in the use of martial weaponry. You gain the Journeyman training rank and a +1 Skill Bonus with weapons in the Simple, Heavy, and Balanced categories.

sunderingstrike0.name: Sundering Strike
sunderingstrike0.description: You know a martial technique to exploit the weakest points of an enemy's defenses, exposing them to further harm.

sunderingStrike.name: Sundering Strike
sunderingStrike.description: You make a Strike with a Strength-scaling weapon which, if successful, applies the @Condition[exposed] condition to your target for 3 rounds. This attack is Difficult to perform and deals reduced damage.

pyromancer000000.name: Pyromancer
pyromancer000000.description:
You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Flame. When you cast a Spell or use an action that involves this Rune, your Critical Hits which deal damage cause the @Condition[burning] condition.

The Burning effect lasts for 3 Rounds and deals half your Intellect score as Fire damage to both Health and Morale.

gestureBlast0000.name: Gesture: Blast
gestureBlast0000.description:
You hurl the arcane power of a Rune into an intense explosion of energy at a nearby point you can see.

The Blast gesture scales with Intellect and produces a blast with 6 feet radius centered on a point within 60 feet of the spellcaster. The blast deals 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 2 Hands to cast and has a base cost of 5 Action and 2 Focus.

Playtest Notes

This talent is currently placed at a Tier 4 node. It will eventually only be attainable at a higher level (probably Level 6 required). It is currently available "early" for testing.

runeFlame0000000.name: Rune: Flame
runeFlame0000000.description:
The chaotic force of elemental, thermal energy. The Flame rune governs fire and heat.

The Flame rune scales using Intellect, targets Reflex, and deals Fire damage to Health. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Frost.

enkindle.name: Enkindle
enkindle.description:
Your command of the Rune of Flame allows you to manipulate fire and thermal energy in creative ways, producing one of the following effects:

  • Manifest a burst of elemental flame in one inch sphere which can ignite a candle, torch, or other flammable materials.

  • Imbue your body with momentary thermal shielding which provides you with immunity to fire damage on an immediately subsequent action that costs 1 Action or less.

  • Control the movement of flames within a small area, causing them to flicker, dance, or shift in an animated performance of light and shadow.

Enkindle may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

runeStorm0000000.name: Rune: Storm
runeStorm0000000.description:
The chaotic force of raw electrical energy. The Storm rune governs sources of electrical charge and discharge.

The Storm rune scales using Intellect, targets Reflex, and deals Electrical damage to Health. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Earth.

energize.name: Energize
energize.description:
Your command of the Rune of Storm allows you to conduct the flow of both air and electricity, manipulating charge and aerodynamics to produce one of the following effects:

  • Instill an electromagnetic charge into a metallic object that you touch no larger than a one-foot cube, causing it to strongly adhere to other metals. Only one object can be charged in this way at a given time, casting this spell on a different object causes the prior object to lose its magnetic effect.

  • Gather a squall of wind at your current location in a six-foot radius which blows either as a gust in a single controlled direction or as a cyclone with centripetal force in all directions. Airborne effects in the immediate area are dispersed and unsecured objects with weight less than 1 are flung in the direction of the gust.

  • Produce the concussive sound of a thunderclap at a location you can see within 15 feet of your current position.

Energize may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

ancestry.name: Orcish
ancestry.description: Your birth was marked by the stars and traditions of a proud and enduring people. Your tall and well-toned body and natural propensity for toughness has origins amid a people exposed to the relentless struggle of a harsh northern clime. Your people are known for their strength and resilience above all else.

background.name: Soldier
background.description: You were a rank-and-file member of a military organization of some variety. Discipline made you a survivor and emphasized the importance of demonstrating strength and dominance over others, and years on horseback or marching taught you how to handle all manner of terrain.

biography.public: Agnath is a sword-wielding necromancer who imbues deathly magic into their heavy blows. Agnath aspires to obtain the Spellblade signature talent.

description.public: Small, swift, and deadly, the dagger slips between ribs or into gaps in armor with ease, its wicked edge favored by assassins, thieves, and those who prefer a silent kill.
Small, swift, and deadly, the dagger slips between ribs or into gaps in armor with ease, its wicked edge favored by assassins, thieves, and those who prefer a silent kill.
A base of leather reinforced with small metal studs or riveted plates, this armor strikes a balance between mobility and modest protection against slashes.

diversionist0000.name: Diversionist
diversionist0000.description: You specialize in using subterfuge to distract or trick your opponent during combat.

distract.name: Distract
distract.description: You make a Deception based Skill Attack against the Willpower defense of a target within 30 feet which can see or hear you. On a success, the target loses 1 Focus.

flurry0000000000.name: Flurry
flurry0000000000.description: A martial technique using two weapons to overwhelm a single target with a relentless sequence of attacks.

flurry.name: Flurry
flurry.description: You Strike twice with each weapon, but each strike is Difficult.

bloodletter00000.name: Bloodletter
bloodletter00000.description:
Your precision with weapons which deal Slashing or Piercing damage can cause the @Condition[bleeding] condition on Critical Hits which deal damage to Health.

The @Condition[bleeding] effect lasts for 3 rounds and deals your Dexterity score as additional damage to Health.

counterevade0000.name: Counter Evade
counterevade0000.description: You are practiced in evasive fighting styles which use an enemy's missed attack to devise an opening to counter-attack.

counterEvade.name: Counter Evade
counterEvade.condition: You Dodge an incoming melee Strike.
counterEvade.description: When you defend against a melee attack with a Dodge, you may expend Focus to retaliate with a reduced-cost Strike using your mainhand weapon.

strikefirst00000.name: Strike First
strikefirst00000.description: Shoot first, ask questions later. You gain +1 Boon on any Strike or Spell attack against an enemy whose initiative score is lower than your own.

preternaturalins.name: Preternatural Instinct
preternaturalins.description: Your quickness of mind and body are equally impressive. You gain +2 Boons to all Initiative checks.

defensiveroll000.name: Defensive Roll
defensiveroll000.description: You are a nimble skirmisher, always in movement to stay one step ahead of your enemies in combat.

defensiveRoll.name: Defensive Roll
defensiveRoll.condition: You Dodge an incoming melee Strike.
defensiveRoll.description: When you Dodge a melee attack you can expend Focus to leap into a defensive roll, moving up to your Size in any direction.

skirmisher000000.name: Skirmisher
skirmisher000000.description: You are adept at entering and exiting the fray. When moving out of the Engagement radius of an enemy, that enemy has 2 Banes to any @Action[default reactiveStrike] against you.

impetus000000000.name: Impetus
impetus000000000.description: You are gifted at exploiting the slowness with which others think. If you are first in Initiative order during a round of Combat, you gain +1 current and maximum Action.

lightWeaponTrain.name: Light Weapon Training
lightWeaponTrain.description: You know how to wield light weapons fluidly with a high degree of maneuverability and grace in combat. You are Trained with all weapons in the Light and Balanced categories.

lunge.name: Lunge
lunge.description:
You dart forward nimbly, making a strike with sudden and unexpected swiftness to perform a Strike with a weapon which scales using Dexterity against a single target, with an increased range of +2 feet.

The attack is Difficult, but you do not move from your current position nor does this attack provoke Disengagement.

intercept0000000.name: Intercept
intercept0000000.description: You protect your allies, intercepting blows that might otherwise be directed towards your companions.

intercept.name: Intercept
intercept.condition: An enemy moves into or through your Engagement radius.
intercept.description:
You intercept the path of an enemy which enters your Engagement radius, immediately moving up to your Stride to interpose yourself and block their path.

If the enemy moves out of your Engagement radius or attacks any other creature during their turn, you may make a @Action[default reactiveStrike] against them.

Playtest Notes

The interruption of enemy movement is not yet automated.

stealthNovice000.name: Stealth Novice
stealthNovice000.description:
You have received training in the basics of stealth, infiltration, and subterfuge. You gain the Novice rank in the Stealth skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know how to use light and shadow to mask your presence, to distribute your weight when walking in order to move more quietly, and you have learned a few tricks of disguise in order to blend into a crowd. You can appear unsuspicious when surrounded by others, hide in a darkened room, and can move silently enough to avoid detection by the average person.

deceptionNovice0.name: Deception Novice
deceptionNovice0.description:
You are a liar and manipulator, and deception is a skill you've practiced. You gain the Novice rank in the Deception skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know how to construct basic lies and cons, and the telltale signs that tend to give away poor liars. You can construct a basic forgery for most common documents, but they won't stand up to any measure of close scrutiny.

description.public: Thin, tapered, and made for piercing, the stiletto is a killer’s weapon — designed to slide between ribs or gaps in armor and leave barely a trace.
This potion contains a specialized alchemical formula to rapidly close wounds and improve bodily health.

healingElixir.name: Healing Elixir
healingElixir.description:
Immediately recover an amount of Health dependant on the quality of the elixir.

  • Shoddy - Immediately heals 6 Health.

  • Standard - Immediately heals 12 Health.

  • Fine - Immediately heals 24 Health.

  • Superior - Immediately heals 48 Health.

  • Masterwork - Immediately heals 96 Health.

description.public: A slender phial that contains a slightly golden-colored liquid. It smells foul, but contains the alchemical agents necessary to neutralize a wide variety of toxins.

antitoxin.name: Antitoxin
antitoxin.description:
Consuming this @ref[name] is able to neutralize any @Condition[poisoned] conditions affecting the target. Stronger poisons require a stronger antitoxin to neutralize.

The category of poison negated by this @ref[name] depends on its quality:

  • Shoddy - Poisons dealing 3 damage or less per round

  • Standard - Poisons dealing 5 damage or less per round

  • Fine - Poisons dealing 7 damage or less per round

  • Superior - Poisons dealing 9 damage or less per round

  • Masterwork - Poisons dealing 11 damage or less per round

description.public: This small vial contains murky liquid that is noticeably thicker than water. It emits a disconcerting scent that evokes a sense of wrongness.

poisonIngest.name: Ingest Poison
poisonIngest.description:
When this toxin is ingested or otherwise enters the bloodstream of a creature, it is initially Harmless, but the target must defend an attack against its Fortitude or become @Condition[poisoned].

The amount of poison damage and its duration is dependent on the quality of the @ref[name]:

  • Shoddy - 2 damage for 4 rounds

  • Standard - 4 damage for 6 rounds

  • Fine - 6 damage for 8 rounds

  • Superior - 8 damage for 10 rounds

  • Masterwork - 10 damage for 12 rounds

This action should be used when the poison is ingested rather than when it is first applied.

poisonApply.name: Apply Poison
poisonApply.description:
The contents of this vial can be added to food, drink, smeared upon a bladed weapon, or combined with some alternative delivery mechanism.

This action, which consumes the available usage of the poison, should be used when it is first applied.

medicineNovice00.name: Medicine Novice
medicineNovice00.description:
You have a basic education in anatomy, physiology, and medicine. You gain the Novice rank in the Medicine skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You’ve learned the basics of treating common wounds and illnesses, and keep a running list of known alchemical and herbal compounds that can be used for treating particular illnesses. With a little time studying an injured, diseased, or otherwise ill individual you can perform a basic diagnosis and treat accordingly.

flashOfSteel0000.name: Flash of Steel
flashOfSteel0000.description: You are an expert in using a thrown weapon to imbalance or expose your target for follow-up strikes.

flashOfSteel.name: Flash of Steel
flashOfSteel.description: You make a Thrown weapon attack, targeting a weak point in your enemy's defences. If the attack hits, the target becomes @Condition[exposed] until the start of their next Turn.

anticipateharm00.name: Anticipate Harm
anticipateharm00.description: Your keen reflexes and acuity allow you to anticipate imminent danger and react to avoid it.

anticipateHarm.name: Anticipate Harm
anticipateHarm.condition: You are targeted by an area-of-effect attack, the source of which you can see.
anticipateHarm.description: You may immediately move 4 feet after the area-of-effect of the attack is declared. If this movement escapes the area of the attack, you are unaffected.

assassin00000000.name: Assassin
assassin00000000.description:
You specialize in bringing death the the unwary. Any Strike or Spell attack against an @Condition[unaware] target becomes Deadly.

An Unaware creature hit by your attack may not alert its allies until its own turn in Combat.

markForDeath.name: Mark For Death
markForDeath.description:
You spend 1 minute studying a creature. Perform a Knowledge Test about your target. If successful, you learn all damage types against which the target is Vulnerable. Your minimum Initiative during the first round of Combat becomes one greater than the Initiative of your marked target.

Playtest Notes

This action is not yet automated.

interruptingDagg.name: Interrupting Throw
interruptingDagg.description: You are alert and prepared to use your equipped weapon to interrupt enemy spellcraft.

interruptingThrow.name: Interrupting Throw
interruptingThrow.condition: An enemy you can see casts a Spell which costs 3 Action or greater.
interruptingThrow.description: When an enemy that you can see casts a Spell which costs 3 Action or greater, you can make a Reaction to perform a Thrown weapon attack against the caster. If your attack results in a Critical Hit the spell is interrupted and its magic is lost.

lightWeaponProfi.name: Light Weapon Proficiency
lightWeaponProfi.description: You have a fluent education in the use of martial weaponry. You gain the Journeyman training rank and a +1 Skill Bonus with weapons in the Light and Balanced categories.

awarenessNovice0.name: Awareness Novice
awarenessNovice0.description:
You have been trained in the basics of situational awareness, and are able to notice important details about your environment. You gain the Novice rank in the Awareness skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know to check for exits when you enter a room, and how to look for concealed weapons, hidden traps, and other threats. You know how to spot when you are being followed, and how to search for common hiding places.

backstab00000000.name: Backstab
backstab00000000.description: You focus your cunning instincts on exploiting the weak points of a flanked target. You identify an opportunity and strike with deadly efficiency.

backstab.name: Backstab
backstab.condition: You are attacking a target with the Flanked condition.
backstab.description: You Strike with your weapon against a @Condition[flanked] target, dealing Deadly damage.

dualWield0000000.name: Dual Wield
dualWield0000000.description: You are adept at fighting with two weapons simultaneously. You can weave attacks together to strike more rapidly than possible with a single weapon.

offhandStrike.name: Offhand Strike
offhandStrike.description: Immediately after you perform a basic Strike with your mainhand weapon, you make a reduced-cost follow-up Strike with your offhand weapon.

ancestry.name: Human
ancestry.description: Found amid countless conditions and far-flung places, you were born an ever-adaptable human. Tall or short, thin, muscular, or rotund, your physical appearance is nothing if not varied. Humans are most known for a genetic predisposition toward determination, with traditions that drive a stubborn will to survive.

background.name: Urchin
background.description: Few learn to survive the way you did. Yours was a harsh education in distrust. You learned to watch others for the telltale signs of danger or disloyalty, to avoid the attention of others, scavenging for scraps of food on the streets of some urban sprawl.

biography.public: Belladonna is a cunning rogue who fights with two daggers, dealing a rapid sequence of blows against an unwary target. Belladonna aspires to obtain the Poisoner signature talent.

description.public: Overlapping metal plates sewn or riveted onto a leather or cloth backing, scale mail resembles the hide of a dragon and protects well against cuts and stabs—though it's noisy and inflexible.

intimidator00000.name: Intimidator
intimidator00000.description: You specialize in exerting your intimidating presence to break the morale of your foes.

intimidate.name: Intimidate
intimidate.description: You physically intimidate an enemy that is within your engagement range, performing an Intimidation skill attack against your target. On a success they sustain Void damage to Morale.

secondwind000000.name: Second Wind
