secondwind000000.description: Your physical hardiness allows you to push yourself beyond conventional limits.

secondWind.name: Second Wind
secondWind.description: You focus your energy and recover your Toughness score in Health.

gestureward00000.name: Gesture: Ward
gestureward00000.description:
You shape the arcane power of a Rune into a protective barrier used to shield yourself from harm.

The Ward gesture scales using Toughness and provides +6 Resistance against the damage type of the Rune used in the spell. This resistance lasts for 1 Round and you may only have a single Ward at a time. Casting another spell using the Ward gesture replaces your prior Ward. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 2 Action and 1 Focus.

counterstrike000.name: Counter Strike
counterstrike000.description: You are trained to transition between defending with your shield and a swift counter-attack.

counterStrike.name: Counter Strike
counterStrike.condition: You Block an incoming melee Strike.
counterStrike.description: When you defend against a melee attack with a Block you may expend Focus to retaliate with a reduced-cost Strike using your mainhand weapon.

dreadlord0000000.name: Dread Lord
dreadlord0000000.description: You exude a terrible presence on the battlefield which tests the morale of nearby enemies that behold you, breaking the resolve of the weak-willed.

formidablePresence.name: Formidable Presence
formidablePresence.description: You make an Intimidation skill attack against the Willpower defense of enemies within 12 feet, dealing Void damage to Morale and causing the Frightened condition for 1 Round to those whose defense you overcome.

bulwark000000000.name: Bulwark
bulwark000000000.description:
You have expertise in using a Shield to defend yourself and others.

Once per Turn while you have a Shield equipped, you may use the Defend action at a reduced cost of 1 Action Point.

testudo000000000.name: Testudo
testudo000000000.description: You are highly skilled in using shields to adopt a defensive posture. You gain double the benefit of the @Condition[guarded] condition against Weapon Attacks while wielding a shield.

holdfast00000000.name: Hold Fast
holdfast00000000.description: You are a calm anchor in the swirling sea of combat. When you have a Shield equipped, your Engagement increases by +1, allowing you to simultaneously engage more adjacent foes.

awarenessNovice0.name: Awareness Novice
awarenessNovice0.description:
You have been trained in the basics of situational awareness, and are able to notice important details about your environment. You gain the Novice rank in the Awareness skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know to check for exits when you enter a room, and how to look for concealed weapons, hidden traps, and other threats. You know how to spot when you are being followed, and how to search for common hiding places.

intimidationNovi.name: Intimidation Novice
intimidationNovi.description:
You understand the fundamentals of how threats and coercion can achieve desired outcomes. You gain the Novice rank in the Intimidation skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know how to use simple displays of violence or overt threats to get others to follow your lead, but you aren't very subtle.

unarmedCombatTra.name: Unarmed Combat Training
unarmedCombatTra.description: You are familiar with basic martial arts and hand-to-hand combat. You know how to subdue or restrain opponents using your physical Strength. You are Trained with weapons in the Unarmed category.

grapple.name: Grapple
grapple.description: You attempt to physically restrain or subdue an opponent. Perform a Athletics skill attack against an adjacent target. If successful, both you and your target are @Condition[restrained] for 1 Round.

intercept0000000.name: Intercept
intercept0000000.description: You protect your allies, intercepting blows that might otherwise be directed towards your companions.

intercept.name: Intercept
intercept.condition: An enemy moves into or through your Engagement radius.
intercept.description:
You intercept the path of an enemy which enters your Engagement radius, immediately moving up to your Stride to interpose yourself and block their path.

If the enemy moves out of your Engagement radius or attacks any other creature during their turn, you may make a @Action[default reactiveStrike] against them.

Playtest Notes

The interruption of enemy movement is not yet automated.

shieldward000000.name: Shield Ward
shieldward000000.description: You have mastered a specialized technique to incorporate a physical shield into the Ward gesture. You may ignore the free-hand requirement for spells using the Ward gesture while you have a Shield equipped.

heavyWeaponTrain.name: Heavy Weapon Training
heavyWeaponTrain.description: You know how to use a heavy weapon to deliver punishing blows, putting your entire strength behind every swing. You are Trained with all weapons in the Heavy and Balanced categories.

heavyStrike.name: Heavy Strike
heavyStrike.description: You unleash a powerful Strike with your mainhand weapon. The attack is slower to execute, but is Empowered to deliver additional damage.

athleticsNovice0.name: Athletics Novice
athleticsNovice0.description:
You have received training in basic athletics. You gain the Novice rank in the Athletics skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know whether a surface can support your weight or not, how to find handholds while climbing, and how to distribute your weight for buoyancy when swimming. You know how to run for distance, and how to pace yourself to avoid exhaustion.

armoredShell0000.name: Armored Shell
armoredShell0000.description:
You are expert in using your armor in combination with your shield to create a defensive shell.

When you have the @Condition[guarded] condition and have a Heavy Shield equipped, your base Armor defense is reduced by half but your Block defense increases by a corresponding amount.

shieldCombatTrai.name: Shield Combat Training
shieldCombatTrai.description: You are practiced at fighting with shield, using it to slam into and imbalance your foes. You are Trained with weapons in the Shield category.

shieldBash.name: Shield Bash
shieldBash.description: Following a basic Strike with your mainhand weapon, you Strike with your shield, causing the @Condition[staggered] condition for one Round.

shieldCombatProf.name: Shield Combat Proficiency
shieldCombatProf.description: You have a fluent education in the use of shields in combat. You gain the Journeyman training rank and a +1 Skill Bonus with weapons in the Shield category.

description.public: A slightly curved bar of strong metal featuring a hook with a flattened head on one end. Used to apply leverage, prying one object loose of another.
This potion contains a specialized alchemical formula to rapidly close wounds and improve bodily health.

healingElixir.name: Healing Elixir
healingElixir.description:
Immediately recover an amount of Health dependant on the quality of the elixir.

  • Shoddy - Immediately heals 6 Health.

  • Standard - Immediately heals 12 Health.

  • Fine - Immediately heals 24 Health.

  • Superior - Immediately heals 48 Health.

  • Masterwork - Immediately heals 96 Health.

description.public:
An expanded toolbelt in the form of a utility belt, a bandolier, or an array of pockets stitched into your equipment.

This item provides a number of additional Toolbelt slots according to its quality tier:

  • Standard: +1 Toolbelt slot

  • Fine: +2 Toolbelt slots

  • Superior: +3 Toolbelt slots

  • Masterwork: +4 Toolbelt slots

runeKinesis00000.name: Rune: Kinesis
runeKinesis00000.description:
The chaotic force of space and physical movement. The Kinesis rune governs all things related to the act of movement and physicality.

The Kinesis rune scales using Presence, targets Physical defense, and deals Bludgeoning, Piercing, or Slashing damage to Health. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Control.

propel.name: Propel
propel.description:
Your command of the Rune of Kinesis allows you to exert local control over gravitational forces to perform basic telekinetic manipulations, producing one of the following effects:

  • Pull an unsecured object within 15 feet and with weight no greater than 1 towards you and catch it. An object that is equipped or possessed by a creature is never treated as unsecured unless that creature is willing to release it.

  • Flick an object that you hold with weight no greater than 1 towards a target up to 30 feet away. The object flies unerringly in a straight line towards that target at a moderate speed. Any creature along the object's path can react to catch it as long as they have a free hand with which to do so.

  • Suspend in midair an object or willing creature that you touch with weight less than or equal to 10 times your Presence, altering its position up to 20 feet in any direction from its original location. You can maintain this suspension indefinitely as long as you take no further Action and are not @Condition[incapacitated].

Propel may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch unless otherwise specified. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

runewarden000000.name: Runewarden
runewarden000000.description:
Your mastery of the arcane makes you more resilient to elemental and spiritual harm. You gain a bonus to Resistance equal to half your Wisdom for each Elemental or Spiritual damage type where you know the Arcane Rune attuned to that damage type.

When you use the Ward gesture, the Resistance provided by your Ward also increases by half your Wisdom.

description.public: Named for its iron shape resembling the base of a clothes iron, the heater shield offers a balance of coverage and mobility.
Built to crush plate and shatter shields, the war hammer features a heavy, blunt head mounted atop a reinforced haft, delivering ruin in the hands of those who favor power over finesse.
A powerful, steel-limbed crossbow requiring a crank or lever to draw, it delivers devastating bolts capable of punching through armor or pinning enemies to walls.

mentalfortress00.name: Mental Fortress
mentalfortress00.description: Your strong will makes you exceedingly difficult to influence. You gain +1 to your Willpower defense and +5 resistance to Psychic damage.

rallyingCry00000.name: Rallying Cry
rallyingCry00000.description: Your presence as a battlefield leader fortifies and restores the morale of your allies.

rallyingCry.name: Rallying Cry
rallyingCry.description: You emit a courageous bellow that inspires allies within 12 feet of you to remain stalwart in the face of peril. All allies within range immediately recover your Presence score in Morale and become @Condition[resolute] for 3 Rounds.

ancestry.name: Dwarven
ancestry.description: Like your parents before you, you were born with the enduring fortitude of the Dwarves. Your stout stature and burly physical appearance are the hallmarks of a people born of earth and stone. A legacy of physical resilience is yours to inherit, for in your breast beats a heart of stone.

background.name: Constable
background.description: You were part of a law enforcement organization. You learned how to remain vigilant to your surroundings, work within complex social structures, and affect an imposing presence.

biography.public: Duurath is a stout dwarven defender who uses a hammer and shield to protect his allies and punish enemies by sapping their morale. Duurath aspires to obtain the Runewarden signature talent.

description.public: With its wide, curved blade and deadly arc, the scimitar dances through battle, its edge carving through foes in sweeping, elegant strikes.
A base of leather reinforced with small metal studs or riveted plates, this armor strikes a balance between mobility and modest protection against slashes.

pinningshot00000.name: Pinning Shot
pinningshot00000.description: You fire a tactically placed shot to pin your target against a nearby surface.

pinningShot.name: Pinning Shot
pinningShot.description: You Strike from distance. The attack is Difficult, however if your target is it it becomes @Condition[restrained] until the end of their next Turn.

arcanearcher0000.name: Arcane Archer
arcanearcher0000.description:
Your skill with archery can shape your spellcraft, partially substituting for the somatic gestures of traditional spellcasting.

While using a Projectile weapon as your mainhand weapon, you ignore the free-hand requirement for casting spells using the Arrow gesture and the range of those spells becomes your weapon range.

Immediately after performing a Strike with a projectile weapon, you may cast a spell with its Action cost reduced by 1.

weakpoints000000.name: Weak Points
weakpoints000000.description: You identify moments of opportunity to strike at an enemy's weak points. When attacking a target that is @Condition[unaware], @Condition[flanked], or @Condition[exposed] using a weapon which scales with Dexterity, you gain +2 damage to any Strike.

markprey00000000.name: Mark Prey
markprey00000000.description: You fire a special shot which deals no damage, but explodes in luminous powder clearly marking your target.

markPrey.name: Mark Prey
markPrey.description: You Strike using a special shot. If your attack is successful the target is @Condition[exposed] for the next 3 Turns.

evasiveshot00000.name: Evasive Shot
evasiveshot00000.description: You are an expert at firing shots with ranged weaponry while evading enemy attacks.

evasiveShot.name: Evasive Shot
evasiveShot.description: After performing a ranged weapon attack, you may move up to half your Stride for free.

gesturearrow0000.name: Gesture: Arrow
gesturearrow0000.description:
You hurl a projectile imbued with the magical power of a Rune at a distant target.

The Arrow gesture scales using Intellect and targets a single creature up to a distance of 60 feet, dealing 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

precisionshot000.name: Precision Shot
precisionshot000.description: You take time to steady your aim and target the weakest point of a foe. You may only get one shot, but you make it count.

precisionShot.name: Precision Shot
precisionShot.description: You steady your aim and fire a single accurate shot.

stealthNovice000.name: Stealth Novice
stealthNovice000.description:
You have received training in the basics of stealth, infiltration, and subterfuge. You gain the Novice rank in the Stealth skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know how to use light and shadow to mask your presence, to distribute your weight when walking in order to move more quietly, and you have learned a few tricks of disguise in order to blend into a crowd. You can appear unsuspicious when surrounded by others, hide in a darkened room, and can move silently enough to avoid detection by the average person.

fanofarrows00000.name: Fan of Arrows
fanofarrows00000.description: This difficult ranged weaponry technique allows you to fire a multiple shots with your weapon in a sweeping cone, each targeting a different enemy in the area of effect.

fanOfArrows.name: Fan of Arrows
fanOfArrows.description: You fire multiple projectiles from your ranged weapon in an arc, striking all enemy targets within a 40 foot cone.

twinnedshot00000.name: Twinned Shot
twinnedshot00000.description: You prepare two shots to fire simultaneously at a single target.

twinnedShot.name: Twinned Shot
twinnedShot.description: You concentrate to nock two projectiles at once making two Strike simultaneous attacks against the same single target.

projectileProfic.name: Projectile Weapon Proficiency
projectileProfic.description: You have a fluent education in the use of projectile weaponry. You gain the Journeyman training rank and a +1 Skill Bonus with weapons in the Projectile category.

gesturestep00000.name: Gesture: Step
gesturestep00000.description:
You infuse runic power into a movement, crossing physical and spatial boundaries.

The Step gesture scales with Dexterity and allows you to move up to 20 feet in a straight line with width equal to your Size. It deals 2 Base Damage to targets along that line which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture does not require any free hands to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Playtest Notes

The movement aspect of this talent is not yet automated and must be manually performed as a consequence of the spell.

skirmisher000000.name: Skirmisher
skirmisher000000.description: You are adept at entering and exiting the fray. When moving out of the Engagement radius of an enemy, that enemy has 2 Banes to any @Action[default reactiveStrike] against you.

diversionist0000.name: Diversionist
diversionist0000.description: You specialize in using subterfuge to distract or trick your opponent during combat.

distract.name: Distract
distract.description: You make a Deception based Skill Attack against the Willpower defense of a target within 30 feet which can see or hear you. On a success, the target loses 1 Focus.

surgeweaver00000.name: Surgeweaver
surgeweaver00000.description:
You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Storm. When you cast a Spell or use an action that involves this Rune, your Critical Hits which deal damage cause the @Condition[shocked] condition.

The Shocked effect lasts for 3 Rounds, deals half your Intellect score as Electricity damage to Morale, and applies the @Condition[staggered] condition.

awarenessNovice0.name: Awareness Novice
awarenessNovice0.description:
You have been trained in the basics of situational awareness, and are able to notice important details about your environment. You gain the Novice rank in the Awareness skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know to check for exits when you enter a room, and how to look for concealed weapons, hidden traps, and other threats. You know how to spot when you are being followed, and how to search for common hiding places.

runeIllusion0000.name: Rune: Illusion
runeIllusion0000.description:
The chaotic force of trickery and whimsy. The illusion rune governs magical manifestations of falsehood or misdirection.

The Illusion rune scales using Intellect, targets Willpower defense, and deals Psychic damage to Morale. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Illumination.

seeming.name: Seeming
seeming.description:
Your command of the Rune of Illusion allows you to fabricate perception in various simple ways and to manipulate shadow and light to create distraction or entertainment, producing one of the following effects:

  • Modify a single aspect of your own physical appearance. Such alterations might include adjusting the sound of your voice, changing the color of your eyes, gaining illusory horns, or appearing slightly taller or shorter. The alteration persists until you Rest or enact a different alteration and can be verified as illusory by physical inspection.

  • Manifest a convincing recreation of a short sound or single scent that you can clearly recall. The illusion originates from your position and lasts for 10 seconds. You can control the volume of the sound or odorousness of the scent to be perceptible up to a range of 60 feet or shorter.

  • Decouple your shadow from your form, specifically controlling its movements separately from your own. You can maintain this illusion as long as you do not perform any other action that consumes Focus.

Seeming may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

subtleextricatio.name: Subtle Extrication
subtleextricatio.description: You understand how to move away from an opponent without exposing yourself to the worst attacks in return. Any Reactive Strike against you is performed with +1 Bane.

focusedanticipat.name: Focused Anticipation
focusedanticipat.description: Anticipation leads to decisive action. When you have the highest Initiative score for a Round of combat, you gain +1 Focus.

description.public: A flask filled with a reddish liquid explodes when it breaks open, creating a small explosive fire that quickly dissipates.
description.private: Primarily used to break apart large pieces of ore, these alchemical flasks pack a concentrated punch. If combined in a large enough quantity, they can also be used to create a chain reaction that results in larger explosions.

blastFlask.name: Blast Flask
blastFlask.description:
You light and throw the @ref[name], dealing Fire damage to all enemies in the radius of the explosion. The radius of the Blast depends on the quality of the bomb:

  • Shoddy - 3 feet

  • Standard - 4 feet

  • Fine - 6 feet

  • Superior - 8 feet

  • Masterwork - 10 feet

projectileWeapon.name: Projectile Weapon Training
projectileWeapon.description: You have a basic education in archery and other projectile weaponry. You are no longer treated as Untrained with weapons in the Projectile categories.

quickDraw.name: Quick Draw
quickDraw.description: You can loose a shot under pressure, although with decreased accuracy. You perform a Strike that is Difficult, but has a reduced Action cost.

description.public: Compact and quick to draw, the shortbow excels in rapid, close-quarters archery and skirmishes, favored by scouts, hunters, and swift-footed raiders.

runeStorm0000000.name: Rune: Storm
runeStorm0000000.description:
The chaotic force of raw electrical energy. The Storm rune governs sources of electrical charge and discharge.

The Storm rune scales using Intellect, targets Reflex, and deals Electrical damage to Health. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Earth.

energize.name: Energize
energize.description:
Your command of the Rune of Storm allows you to conduct the flow of both air and electricity, manipulating charge and aerodynamics to produce one of the following effects:

  • Instill an electromagnetic charge into a metallic object that you touch no larger than a one-foot cube, causing it to strongly adhere to other metals. Only one object can be charged in this way at a given time, casting this spell on a different object causes the prior object to lose its magnetic effect.

  • Gather a squall of wind at your current location in a six-foot radius which blows either as a gust in a single controlled direction or as a cyclone with centripetal force in all directions. Airborne effects in the immediate area are dispersed and unsecured objects with weight less than 1 are flung in the direction of the gust.

  • Produce the concussive sound of a thunderclap at a location you can see within 15 feet of your current position.

Energize may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

ancestry.name: Elvish
ancestry.description: Graceful in movement and swift in thought, you were born a long-lived elf. Your slight and nimble frame and sculpted features are the inherited traits of a people for whom elegance is a way of life. Your predisposition toward quick-thinking and precise movement the evolutionary results of hundreds of years of tradition.

background.name: Wanderer
background.description: Yours has been an itinerant life. You enjoy nothing more than the feeling of a cart or mount below you, watching some foreign sky slowly pass above you. You learned to pay careful attention to your surroundings and their needs, to tend the creatures on which you rely, and to make do with what you can find.

biography.public: Eliorwen is a nimble skirmisher who uses archery and spellcraft to suppress and eliminates foes from a tremendous distnace. Eliorwen aspires to obtain the Arcane Archer signature talent.

description.public: Ring mail features metal rings sewn onto a padded base, offering a compromise of less protection than heavier mail options in exchange for greater mobility.

A sphere of crystal or glass that — in the palm of a capable spellcaster — becomes a conduit for their power. It gathers voltaic energy within its orb before blasting a target with electrifying force.
This heavy tome is used as a repository of knowledge as well as an implement for spellcraft. In the hands of an arcane practitioner, it can project concussive blasts of force towards a target.

intuitweakness00.name: Intuit Weakness
intuitweakness00.description:
You calm your mind and study the physiology of your foe, seeking a vulnerability in its defenses.

Perform a Knowledge Test using an appropriate Skill chosen by the Gamemaster. On a success, you learn the Damage type that the creature has the greatest vulnerability towards, if any. On a Critical Success you learn the two Damage types which have the largest vulnerability.

intuitWeakness.name: Intuit Weakness
intuitWeakness.description: You still your mind and study the physiology of your foe, attempting to identify a vulnerability in its defenses.

gesturearrow0000.name: Gesture: Arrow
gesturearrow0000.description:
You hurl a projectile imbued with the magical power of a Rune at a distant target.

The Arrow gesture scales using Intellect and targets a single creature up to a distance of 60 feet, dealing 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

gesturecreate000.name: Gesture: Create
gesturecreate000.description:
You coalesce arcane power into tangible form, manifesting a Sprite which appears within 10 feet and joins Combat at Initiative 1. Your Sprite is a Minion of half your own Level.

The Create gesture scales with Wisdom and the Sprite survives for 6 Rounds. You may only have one active Sprite, casting another spell using the Create gesture replaces your previous Sprite. This gesture requires 2 Hands to cast and has a base cost of 4 Action and 1 Focus.

Playtest Notes

Not all Runes have a Sprite actor defined yet. Runes that do not yet have a defined Creation will — for now — manifest a Flame Sprite.

inflectioncompos.name: Inflection: Compose
inflectioncompos.description: Enhance a spell by taking extra time in its formation, reducing other resource costs in exchange. The Compose inflection reduces the Focus cost of a spell by 1 while increasing its Action cost by 1 in exchange.

conjurer00000000.name: Conjurer
conjurer00000000.description: You are a master of Conjuration and the Gesture of Creation to manifest arcane energy as physical form. You can maintain up to 3 such creations simultaneously rather than only one.

rimecaller000000.name: Rimecaller
rimecaller000000.description:
You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Frost. When you cast a Spell or use an action that involves this Rune, your Critical Hits which deal damage cause the @Condition[freezing] condition.

The Freezing effect lasts for 1 Round, deals half your Wisdom score as Frost damage to Health, and applies the @Condition[slowed] condition.

recognizespellcr.name: Recognize Spellcraft
recognizespellcr.description: You can interpret the arcane incantations of others to discern the nature of their spellcraft. When an enemy within 40 feet that you can see and hear begins casting a spell, you can identify its Rune if you also know that Rune.

counterspell0000.name: Counterspell
counterspell0000.description:
You immediately react to a spell being cast and compose a rune and gesture designed to unravel and negate the spellcraft of an enemy mage.

Playtest Notes

This action can now be used in playtesting, but it is not yet fully automated. The Counterspell can be performed, but it is up to the Gamemaster to manually reverse a previously applied spell and to manually deduct its Action and Focus cost. These steps of the overall Counterspell workflow will be automated in a subsequent update such that a confirmed Counterspell will also confirm the spell that was countered, but with its effects removed.

counterspell.name: Counterspell
counterspell.condition: Another creature which you can see is casting a spell.
counterspell.description:
You form arcane energy into a countervailing spellcraft, targeting a spellcaster you can see within 30 feet.

Designate a Rune and Gesture which you know to attempt to counter the spell. Choosing a Rune which is opposed to one used in the spell grants +2 Boons to your attempt. Selecting the identical Gesture as the one being cast also adds +2 Boons to your attempt.

Perform a harmless Spell Attack against your target's Willpower defense. If your roll exceeds their defense, the spell is countered and its magic is nullified, producing no effects.

tactician0000000.name: Tactician
tactician0000000.description: You are a cunning battlefield tactician, able to organize and direct your allies to act with increased effectiveness.

tacticalPlan.name: Tactical Plan
tacticalPlan.description: Using 10 words or fewer, describe a course of action to an ally who acts after you in Initiative order. If that ally carries out your described plan later in the same Round, they gain +2 Boons on any dice rolls associated with that plan. The Gamemaster may arbitrate whether or not the plan was followed.

wildspeaker00000.name: Wildspeaker
wildspeaker00000.description: You have a preternatural knack for communicating with animals. Through body language and sounds, you are capable of interpreting and communicating in the language of the wilderness.

wildspeak.name: Wildspeak
wildspeak.description:
If you succeed on a [[/skillCheck wilderness 14]] check, you may pose simple questions to a Beast which can perceive you. As long as the creature is not hostile it will respond accurately within the limits of its own knowledge.

  • Beasts with an Intellect score of zero are incapable of understanding you.

  • Beasts with an Intellect score of 1 can only respond with "yes" or "no" responses.

  • Beasts with an Intellect score greater than 1 can provide simple multi-word responses.

runeIllusion0000.name: Rune: Illusion
runeIllusion0000.description:
The chaotic force of trickery and whimsy. The illusion rune governs magical manifestations of falsehood or misdirection.

The Illusion rune scales using Intellect, targets Willpower defense, and deals Psychic damage to Morale. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Illumination.

seeming.name: Seeming
seeming.description:
Your command of the Rune of Illusion allows you to fabricate perception in various simple ways and to manipulate shadow and light to create distraction or entertainment, producing one of the following effects:

  • Modify a single aspect of your own physical appearance. Such alterations might include adjusting the sound of your voice, changing the color of your eyes, gaining illusory horns, or appearing slightly taller or shorter. The alteration persists until you Rest or enact a different alteration and can be verified as illusory by physical inspection.

  • Manifest a convincing recreation of a short sound or single scent that you can clearly recall. The illusion originates from your position and lasts for 10 seconds. You can control the volume of the sound or odorousness of the scent to be perceptible up to a range of 60 feet or shorter.

  • Decouple your shadow from your form, specifically controlling its movements separately from your own. You can maintain this illusion as long as you do not perform any other action that consumes Focus.

Seeming may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

surgeweaver00000.name: Surgeweaver
surgeweaver00000.description:
You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Storm. When you cast a Spell or use an action that involves this Rune, your Critical Hits which deal damage cause the @Condition[shocked] condition.

The Shocked effect lasts for 3 Rounds, deals half your Intellect score as Electricity damage to Morale, and applies the @Condition[staggered] condition.

mesmer0000000000.name: Mesmer
mesmer0000000000.description:
You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Illusion. When you cast a Spell or use an action that involves this Rune, your Critical Hits which deal damage cause the @Condition[confused] condition.

The Confused effect lasts for 1 Round, deals half your Intellect score as Psychic damage to Morale, and applies the @Condition[disoriented] condition.

runeKinesis00000.name: Rune: Kinesis
runeKinesis00000.description:
The chaotic force of space and physical movement. The Kinesis rune governs all things related to the act of movement and physicality.

The Kinesis rune scales using Presence, targets Physical defense, and deals Bludgeoning, Piercing, or Slashing damage to Health. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Control.

propel.name: Propel
propel.description:
Your command of the Rune of Kinesis allows you to exert local control over gravitational forces to perform basic telekinetic manipulations, producing one of the following effects:

  • Pull an unsecured object within 15 feet and with weight no greater than 1 towards you and catch it. An object that is equipped or possessed by a creature is never treated as unsecured unless that creature is willing to release it.

  • Flick an object that you hold with weight no greater than 1 towards a target up to 30 feet away. The object flies unerringly in a straight line towards that target at a moderate speed. Any creature along the object's path can react to catch it as long as they have a free hand with which to do so.

  • Suspend in midair an object or willing creature that you touch with weight less than or equal to 10 times your Presence, altering its position up to 20 feet in any direction from its original location. You can maintain this suspension indefinitely as long as you take no further Action and are not @Condition[incapacitated].

Propel may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch unless otherwise specified. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

runeFrost0000000.name: Rune: Frost
runeFrost0000000.description:
The orderly force of water and cold. The Frost rune governs the creation of water or other fluids and their transfer between liquid and frozen states.

The Frost rune scales using Wisdom, targets Fortitude, and deals Cold damage to Health. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Flame.

condense.name: Condense
condense.description:
Your command of the Rune of Frost allows you to manipulate liquids and their thermal properties, producing one of the following effects:

  • Draw up to one quarter gallon of fresh water from the atmosphere into a container or upon a surface you touch. The created water may be affected by relevant atmospheric properties of your current location.

  • Manipulate the temperature of up to 1 gallon of water, causing it to immediately freeze or thaw. The water need not be in a container; this technique can be used to coat a surface or join two objects together via regelation. Ice created in this way remains frozen for as long as the ambient temperature of the environment allows.

  • Gather up to a six-foot cube of nearby snow, forming it into a solidified sculpture, shape, or shelter.

Condense may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

talismanWeaponTr.name: Talisman Weapon Training
talismanWeaponTr.description: You understand the arcane usage of talismans, orbs, foci, or other similar implements to channel magic or empower spellcraft. You are Trained with weapons in the Talisman categories.

refocus.name: Refocus
refocus.description:
You use your equipped Talisman to attempt to regain some Focus. You perform a Harmless Strike against your own Rallying threshold.

On a success you recover +1 Focus if using a one-handed Talisman and +2 Focus if using a two-handed Talisman. On a critical success the amount of Focus recovered increases by an additional +1.

mechanicalWeapon.name: Mechanical Weapon Training
mechanicalWeapon.description: You are familiar in the design and usage of crossbows, firearms, and other similar armaments. You are Trained with weapons in the Mechanical category.

rapidReload.name: Rapid Reload
rapidReload.description: You focus deeply and calm your nerves to quickly Reload your mechanical weapon with exceptional haste.

unshakeablePoise.name: Unshakeable Poise
unshakeablePoise.description: You demonstrate exceptional poise in stressful circumstances, your cool head prevailing when others around you lose their composure.

unshakeablePoise.name: Unshakeable Poise
unshakeablePoise.description: You expend Heroism to instantly recover your Wisdom in Focus. You may perform this action outside of your turn in Combat before making a Reaction.

gestureConjure00.name: Gesture: Conjure
gestureConjure00.description:
You coalesce arcane power into a superior form, manifesting a Visitor which appears within 30 feet and joins Combat at Initiative 1. Your Visitor is a Minion equal to your own Level.

The Conjure gesture scales with Wisdom and the Visitor survives for 12 Rounds. You may only have one active Visitor. Casting another spell using the Conjure gesture replaces your previous Visitor. This gesture requires 2 Hands to cast and has a base cost of 5 Action and 2 Focus.

Playtest Notes

This talent is currently placed at a Tier 4 node. It will eventually only be attainable at a higher level (probably Level 6 required). It is currently available "early" for testing.

Not all Runes have a Visitor actor defined yet. Runes that do not yet have a defined Conjuration will — for now — manifest a Flame Visitor.

description.public: Thin, tapered, and made for piercing, the stiletto is a killer’s weapon — designed to slide between ribs or gaps in armor and leave barely a trace.

runeStorm0000000.name: Rune: Storm
runeStorm0000000.description:
The chaotic force of raw electrical energy. The Storm rune governs sources of electrical charge and discharge.

The Storm rune scales using Intellect, targets Reflex, and deals Electrical damage to Health. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Earth.

energize.name: Energize
energize.description:
Your command of the Rune of Storm allows you to conduct the flow of both air and electricity, manipulating charge and aerodynamics to produce one of the following effects:

  • Instill an electromagnetic charge into a metallic object that you touch no larger than a one-foot cube, causing it to strongly adhere to other metals. Only one object can be charged in this way at a given time, casting this spell on a different object causes the prior object to lose its magnetic effect.

  • Gather a squall of wind at your current location in a six-foot radius which blows either as a gust in a single controlled direction or as a cyclone with centripetal force in all directions. Airborne effects in the immediate area are dispersed and unsecured objects with weight less than 1 are flung in the direction of the gust.

  • Produce the concussive sound of a thunderclap at a location you can see within 15 feet of your current position.

Energize may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

ancestry.name: Gnome
ancestry.description: Yours was a birth of exuberant celebration. Your diminutive body and delicate features are paired with an almost supernatural propensity for discovery. The traditions of your people embrace a lust for life and the importance of quick-thinking and quick-action.

background.name: Scholar
background.description: You were always most at home in a library or classroom. Your studies focused on unravelling the mysteries of the world around you, and there are few theoretical subjects with which you are not already familiar.

biography.public: Fizzit is a clever spellcrafter and scholar who slings spells from a distance and seeks to harness elemental forces to work in their service. Fizzit aspires to obtain the Conjurer signature talent.

description.public: This mage staff is a talisman to assist with spellcraft or hurl blasts of frigid ice towards enemies.
Overlapping metal plates sewn or riveted onto a leather or cloth backing, scale mail resembles the hide of a dragon and protects well against cuts and stabs—though it's noisy and inflexible.

gestureinfluence.name: Gesture: Influence
gestureinfluence.description:
You intensify the arcane power of a Rune into a concentrated direct contact which is generally a more powerful evolution of the basic Touch gesture.

The Influence gesture scales using Presence and targets a single adjacent creature. It deals 10 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

gestureray000000.name: Gesture: Ray
gestureray000000.description:
You funnel the arcane power of a Rune into a point and project it outwards in a beam.

The Ray gesture scales using Wisdom and produces a line that is 1 foot wide and 30 feet long originating from the spellcaster, dealing 6 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. The gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 4 Action and 1 Focus.

conserveeffort00.name: Conserve Effort
conserveeffort00.description: You find calmness and focus in conserving your effort in battle. When you end your Turn with un-spent Action you gain +1 Focus.

healer0000000000.name: Healer
healer0000000000.description: You are unparalleled at manipulating vital arcana to treat injuries. You learn Rune: Life if you do not already know it. When healing allies using the Rune of Life you gain +2 Boons to your roll.

fontOfLife.name: Font of Life
fontOfLife.description:
You bring forth an aura of life-giving magic. Immediately upon activation and at the start of your turn for 3 Rounds every ally within 20 feet heals for an amount equal to your Wisdom score.

WIP: This action is currently treated as an Area of Effect, granting healing-over-time effects to those within the initial range. When auras are automated by the system in Foundry VTT version 14, the mechanical implementation of this action will match the description.

mentalfortress00.name: Mental Fortress
mentalfortress00.description: Your strong will makes you exceedingly difficult to influence. You gain +1 to your Willpower defense and +5 resistance to Psychic damage.

inflectioncompos.name: Inflection: Compose
inflectioncompos.description: Enhance a spell by taking extra time in its formation, reducing other resource costs in exchange. The Compose inflection reduces the Focus cost of a spell by 1 while increasing its Action cost by 1 in exchange.

dustbinder000000.name: Dustbinder
dustbinder000000.description:
You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Earth. When you cast a Spell or use an action that involves this Rune, your Critical Hits which deal damage cause the @Condition[corroding] condition.

The Corroding effect lasts for 3 Rounds and deals half your Wisdom score as Acid damage to Health each Round.

talismanWeaponTr.name: Talisman Weapon Training
talismanWeaponTr.description: You understand the arcane usage of talismans, orbs, foci, or other similar implements to channel magic or empower spellcraft. You are Trained with weapons in the Talisman categories.

refocus.name: Refocus
refocus.description:
You use your equipped Talisman to attempt to regain some Focus. You perform a Harmless Strike against your own Rallying threshold.

On a success you recover +1 Focus if using a one-handed Talisman and +2 Focus if using a two-handed Talisman. On a critical success the amount of Focus recovered increases by an additional +1.

runewarden000000.name: Runewarden
runewarden000000.description:
Your mastery of the arcane makes you more resilient to elemental and spiritual harm. You gain a bonus to Resistance equal to half your Wisdom for each Elemental or Spiritual damage type where you know the Arcane Rune attuned to that damage type.

When you use the Ward gesture, the Resistance provided by your Ward also increases by half your Wisdom.

wildspeaker00000.name: Wildspeaker
wildspeaker00000.description: You have a preternatural knack for communicating with animals. Through body language and sounds, you are capable of interpreting and communicating in the language of the wilderness.

wildspeak.name: Wildspeak
wildspeak.description:
If you succeed on a [[/skillCheck wilderness 14]] check, you may pose simple questions to a Beast which can perceive you. As long as the creature is not hostile it will respond accurately within the limits of its own knowledge.

  • Beasts with an Intellect score of zero are incapable of understanding you.

  • Beasts with an Intellect score of 1 can only respond with "yes" or "no" responses.

  • Beasts with an Intellect score greater than 1 can provide simple multi-word responses.

description.public: A commonly known recipe for creating a basic healing potion.
description.private: You can turn particular healing herbs found in the wild into a bottled elixir using Alchemists Tools.

description.public: A commonly known recipe for creating a basic healing potion.
description.private: You can turn particular healing herbs found in the wild into a bottled elixir using Alchemists Tools.

versatileTransla.name: Versatile Translator
versatileTransla.description:
You have a scholarly background in linguistics or an intuitive knack for languages. Your capabilities enable you to decipher the basic meaning of text written in a variety of languages.

You can translate text of a language you do not know that is written using a common set of glyphs or characters to a language that you do know. Creating such a translation requires spending one minute per word to transcribe the text into a language which you understand.

Your translations are rudimentary and often lack nuance, but they do contain all essential points of the text.

soothe0000000000.name: Soothe
soothe0000000000.description: You administer a soothing Performance which rallies your allies, restoring Morale.

soothe.name: Soothe
soothe.description: You perform a calming verse, benefiting all allies who can perceive you within 12 feet. Make a Performance Check against the Madness threshold of each ally. On success, each ally's Morale is restored.

gesturepulse0000.name: Gesture: Pulse
gesturepulse0000.description:
Expel the arcane power of a Rune in a radius that travels outward with you at its center.

The Pulse gesture scales using Presence and produces an emanation with 10 foot radius, dealing 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. The gesture requires 2 Hands to cast and has a base cost of 5 Action and 2 Focus.

Playtest Notes

This talent is currently placed at a Tier 4 node. It will eventually only be attainable at a higher level (probably Level 6 required). It is currently available "early" for testing.

inspirator000000.name: Inspirator
inspirator000000.description:
You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Soul. When you cast a Spell or use an action that involves this Rune, your Critical Hits which restore Morale cause the @Condition[inspired] condition.

The Inspired effect lasts for 1 Round and deals your Presence score as additional Restoration to Morale.

mender0000000000.name: Mender
mender0000000000.description:
You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Life. When you cast a Spell or use an action that involves this Rune, your Critical Hits which restore Health cause the @Condition[mending] condition.

The Mending effect lasts for 1 Round and deals your Wisdom score as additional Restoration to Health.

arcanaNovice0000.name: Arcana Novice
arcanaNovice0000.description:
Your education covered the fundamentals of metaphysics and magical theory, the relationship between the runes, the opposing nature of order and chaos, and a cursory introduction to spiritual beings including the most commonly known deified and demonized figures of worship. You gain the Novice rank in the Arcana skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

Your rudimentary understanding of the principle grammar of magic is sufficient to identify which lesser rune a spell or ritual may be using, as well as the gesture used (if not the inflection). You can identify whether a figure is influenced more by chaos or by order, and can spot the signs of common spirits (both lesser and greater). You know enough about religious customs to communicate with those who worship a particular spirit or deity without embarrassing yourself.

runeSoul00000000.name: Rune: Soul
runeSoul00000000.description:
An orderly force of creation and spiritual essence. The Soul rune governs the fundamental procession of souls through life and death and relates to matters of sapience, personality, and mental health.

The Soul rune scales using Presence and provides Restoration of Morale. In special circumstances it may be used to inflict Psychic damage opposed by Willpower. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Oblivion.

evoke.name: Evoke
evoke.description:
Your command of the Rune of Soul allows you to facilitate basic forms of spiritual influence, producing one of the following effects:

  • Enable yourself or another willing person to revisit a core memory of a moment from their past up to one minute in duration as if it happened recently.

  • Identify a negative spiritual condition that is affecting a person such as @Condition[broken], @Condition[frightened], @Condition[confused], or @Condition[insane].

  • Create a momentary spiritual connection with another willing creature that allows them to recognize an idea which can be expressed as a single word.

Uses of Evoke may only affect yourself or another creature which you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

irrepressiblespi.name: Irrepressible Spirit
irrepressiblespi.description: Your tenacity gives you an irrepressible spirit which resists the onset of despair. At the start of your turn if you are not @Condition[broken] you gain 1 Morale.

eyeofthestorm000.name: Eye of the Storm
eyeofthestorm000.description:
After you Delay your Turn, gain +2 Boons on any Strike or Spell attack against an enemy that you allowed to act before you that Round.

TODO: Needs automation. For now apply boons manually.

runeEarth0000000.name: Rune: Earth
runeEarth0000000.description:
The orderly force of elemental earth, responsible for physical matter. The Earth rune governs minerals, metals, soils, and other physical compounds.

The Earth rune scales using Wisdom, targets Reflex, and deals Acid damage to Health. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Storm.

mould.name: Mould
mould.description:
Your command of the Rune of Earth allows you to manipulate raw forces of rock, mineral, and soil in basic ways, producing one of the following effects:

  • Quickly shape up to one cubic foot of available material into a simple geometric form like a cuboid, ellipsoid, or polyhedron.

  • Precisely copy the physical shape of a held object that is smaller than a 6-inch cube, reproducing it from available clay, stone, or metal. The replica retains no useful properties except for its physical form.

  • Separate and collect earthen particles from the surface of an object, creature, or liquid that you touch, rendering the subject completely cleaned or purified in moments.

Mould may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

runeLife00000000.name: Rune: Life
runeLife00000000.description:
A chaotic force of creation, responsible for living matter. The Life rune governs health and matters relating to biological growth.

The Life rune scales using Wisdom and provides Restoration of Health. In special circumstances it may be used to inflict Poison damage opposed by Fortitude. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Death.

bloom.name: Bloom
bloom.description:
Your command of the Rune of Life allows you to stimulate biological growth and nourish physical health, producing one of the following effects:

  • Cultivate 1 cubic foot of existing plants or fungus to rapidly grow to a healthy, blossoming, or harvestable state.

  • Identify a negative physical condition that is affecting a creature such as @Condition[diseased], @Condition[poisoned], @Condition[bleeding], or @Condition[weakened].

  • Verify whether a portion of food or drink is free of contamination from bacteria, parasites, or poison.

Bloom may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

ancestry.name: Giantkin
ancestry.description: Elemental forces presided over your birth, instilling you with supernatural vigor. Your large frame and muscular build often lead others to believe you are an unthinking mass of muscle, but yours is a people known most for their physical resilience and the deep well of their knowledge. You have inherited the strength of mountains.

background.name: Physician
background.description: You were a healer or medical professional of some variety. You have spent a portion of your life learning medical science, and you have a propensity for noticing illness in others. You know how to treat wounds, diseases, and how to identify their sources.

biography.public: Kagura is a stalwart healer who bolsters the health and morale of her allies amidst the frenzy of battle. Kagura aspires to obtain the Healer signature Talent.

description.public: Overlapping metal plates sewn or riveted onto a leather or cloth backing, scale mail resembles the hide of a dragon and protects well against cuts and stabs—though it's noisy and inflexible.
A towering weapon with a broad, often double-bladed head, the greataxe is made for delivering devastating cleaves, hewing men and beasts with terrible force.

intimidator00000.name: Intimidator
intimidator00000.description: You specialize in exerting your intimidating presence to break the morale of your foes.

intimidate.name: Intimidate
intimidate.description: You physically intimidate an enemy that is within your engagement range, performing an Intimidation skill attack against your target. On a success they sustain Void damage to Morale.

uppercut00000000.name: Uppercut
uppercut00000000.description: A two-handed weapon technique where you swing your weapon upwards, making a second Strike with the backswing of your weapon.

uppercut.name: Uppercut
uppercut.description: Following a basic Strike attack which did not critically miss, you Strike the same target again with the backswing of your weapon at reduced Action cost.

cleave0000000000.name: Cleave
cleave0000000000.description: This martial technique is a specialized two-handed fighting maneuver which relies upon brute strength to swing your weapon in a wide arc, hitting multiple enemies in its path.

cleave.name: Cleave
cleave.description: A ferocious two-handed swing cleaves through foes in a 120 degree arc.

powerfulphysique.name: Powerful Physique
powerfulphysique.description: You can wield weapons with the Slow trait and wear Armor with the Bulky trait without suffering Banes to your Initiative rolls.

berserker0000000.name: Berserker
berserker0000000.description: You revel in the thrill of combat, hurling yourself into the fray with reckless abandon.

berserkerRage.name: Berserker Rage
berserkerRage.condition: You have suffered damage to your Health pool since your last turn in Combat.
berserkerRage.description: You become @Condition[enraged]. While Enraged you deal 4 additional damage on all melee attacks. You may attempt to end the effect on your own turn by succeeding on a Willpower test against a DC of 20. The effect ends automatically when Combat is concluded.

stronggrip000000.name: Strong Grip
stronggrip000000.description:
Your grasp of your weaponry is firm and unyielding. While wielding a two-handed weapon that scales with Strength you may cast spells which require two hands, and attempts to Disarm you are made with +2 Banes.

Additionally, you may wield a one-handed Heavy weapon in your off-hand.

bloodfrenzy00000.name: Blood Frenzy
bloodfrenzy00000.description: Your battle lust spurs you to feats of heightened action. When you achieve a Critical Hit that deals damage to Health you immediately gain +1 Action. This benefit may only happen once per Round.

executionersstri.name: Executioner's Strike
executionersstri.description: You deliver a single decisive strike against a wounded enemy.

executionersStrike.name: Executioner's Strike
executionersStrike.description: You deliver a Strike with a two-handed weapon. If your attack is successful and your opponent is under half their maximum Health, the Strike is Deadly, and the opponent suffers the @Condition[bleeding] condition for 3 Rounds, taking additional damage each Round equal to your Strength score.

unshakeablestanc.name: Unshakeable Stance
unshakeablestanc.description:
You cannot be unvoluntarily Moved or knocked @Condition[prone] by any action that is not a Critical Success rolled by an enemy or a Critical Failure rolled by yourself.

Playtest Notes

This talent is not yet automated.

ruthlessmomentum.name: Ruthless Momentum
ruthlessmomentum.description: You relish the carnage you can cause in combat and continue to press the fray as each enemy falls.

ruthlessMomentum.name: Ruthless Momentum
ruthlessMomentum.condition: You incapacitate an enemy with a melee attack.
ruthlessMomentum.description: After defeating an enemy, you immediately move up to your Stride and Strike another foe that you pass next to or end your movement adjacent to.

secondwind000000.name: Second Wind
secondwind000000.description: Your physical hardiness allows you to push yourself beyond conventional limits.

secondWind.name: Second Wind
secondWind.description: You focus your energy and recover your Toughness score in Health.

intercept0000000.name: Intercept
intercept0000000.description: You protect your allies, intercepting blows that might otherwise be directed towards your companions.

intercept.name: Intercept
intercept.condition: An enemy moves into or through your Engagement radius.
intercept.description:
You intercept the path of an enemy which enters your Engagement radius, immediately moving up to your Stride to interpose yourself and block their path.

If the enemy moves out of your Engagement radius or attacks any other creature during their turn, you may make a @Action[default reactiveStrike] against them.

Playtest Notes

The interruption of enemy movement is not yet automated.

unarmedCombatTra.name: Unarmed Combat Training
unarmedCombatTra.description: You are familiar with basic martial arts and hand-to-hand combat. You know how to subdue or restrain opponents using your physical Strength. You are Trained with weapons in the Unarmed category.

grapple.name: Grapple
grapple.description: You attempt to physically restrain or subdue an opponent. Perform a Athletics skill attack against an adjacent target. If successful, both you and your target are @Condition[restrained] for 1 Round.

sunderingstrike0.name: Sundering Strike
sunderingstrike0.description: You know a martial technique to exploit the weakest points of an enemy's defenses, exposing them to further harm.

sunderingStrike.name: Sundering Strike
sunderingStrike.description: You make a Strike with a Strength-scaling weapon which, if successful, applies the @Condition[exposed] condition to your target for 3 rounds. This attack is Difficult to perform and deals reduced damage.

heavyWeaponTrain.name: Heavy Weapon Training
heavyWeaponTrain.description: You know how to use a heavy weapon to deliver punishing blows, putting your entire strength behind every swing. You are Trained with all weapons in the Heavy and Balanced categories.

heavyStrike.name: Heavy Strike
heavyStrike.description: You unleash a powerful Strike with your mainhand weapon. The attack is slower to execute, but is Empowered to deliver additional damage.

heavyWeaponProfi.name: Heavy Weapon Proficiency
heavyWeaponProfi.description: You have a fluent education in the use of martial weaponry. You gain the Journeyman training rank and a +1 Skill Bonus with weapons in the Simple, Heavy, and Balanced categories.

thickskin0000000.name: Thick Skin
thickskin0000000.description: Your physical toughness makes you more resistant to harm. You gain +2 Resistance to Bludgeoning, Slashing, and Piercing damage.

armoredefficienc.name: Armored Efficiency
armoredefficienc.description: You are trained in wearing the heaviest types of armor while still retaining mobility. You are able to use a free Movement action once per Turn while wearing Heavy armor.

penetratingThrow.name: Penetrating Throw
penetratingThrow.description: You can hurl your weapon with such ferocity that it strikes all targets in a direct line.

penetratingThrow.name: Penetrating Throw
penetratingThrow.description: You perform a Throw weapon strike which penetrates to hit all enemies in a straight line.

description.public: Thin, tapered, and made for piercing, the stiletto is a killer’s weapon — designed to slide between ribs or gaps in armor and leave barely a trace.

adrenalineSurge0.name: Adrenaline Surge
adrenalineSurge0.description: You can draw upon exceptional reserves of physical strength to meet challenges imposed on your body.

adrenalineSurge.name: Adrenaline Surge
adrenalineSurge.description: You expend Heroism and benefit from +2 Boons to any action which scales using Strength for 3 Rounds. You may perform this action outside of your turn in Combat before making a Reaction.

ancestry.name: Human
ancestry.description: Found amid countless conditions and far-flung places, you were born an ever-adaptable human. Tall or short, thin, muscular, or rotund, your physical appearance is nothing if not varied. Humans are most known for a genetic predisposition toward determination, with traditions that drive a stubborn will to survive.

background.name: Constable
background.description: You were part of a law enforcement organization. You learned how to remain vigilant to your surroundings, work within complex social structures, and affect an imposing presence.

biography.public: Ulfen is a fierce warrior who fights with a two-handed greataxe, favoring heavy blows that do significant damage or hit multiple targets. Ulfen aspires to obtain the Berserker signature talent.

description.public: This mage staff is a talisman to assist with spellcraft or hurl gouts of arcane flame at enemies.
Ring mail features metal rings sewn onto a padded base, offering a compromise of less protection than heavier mail options in exchange for greater mobility.

inspireheroism00.name: Inspire Heroism
inspireheroism00.description: Your courageous presence inspires your nearby allies to strike with confidence.

inspireHeroism.name: Inspire Heroism
inspireHeroism.description: Each ally, excluding yourself, within 10 Feet gains +1 Boon to actions performed until the end of their next Turn.

gestureinfluence.name: Gesture: Influence
gestureinfluence.description:
You intensify the arcane power of a Rune into a concentrated direct contact which is generally a more powerful evolution of the basic Touch gesture.

The Influence gesture scales using Presence and targets a single adjacent creature. It deals 10 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

warmage000000000.name: War Mage
warmage000000000.description: Your spellcraft is honed as a weapon of war to thwart the incantations of other magi. You may ask the Gamemaster if you know a Rune capable of countering an enemy spell, even if you do not recognize the spell being cast. You gain +2 Boons to any @Action[Compendium.crucible.talent.Item.counterspell0000 counterspell] attempt.

gesturearrow0000.name: Gesture: Arrow
gesturearrow0000.description:
You hurl a projectile imbued with the magical power of a Rune at a distant target.

The Arrow gesture scales using Intellect and targets a single creature up to a distance of 60 feet, dealing 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

impetus000000000.name: Impetus
impetus000000000.description: You are gifted at exploiting the slowness with which others think. If you are first in Initiative order during a round of Combat, you gain +1 current and maximum Action.

opportunisticspe.name: Opportunistic Spellcraft
opportunisticspe.description: Your quick thinking can weave magic to exploit brief windows of opportunity. You may make a Disengagement Attack using the Touch Gesture instead of a melee weapon attack.

pyromancer000000.name: Pyromancer
pyromancer000000.description:
You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Flame. When you cast a Spell or use an action that involves this Rune, your Critical Hits which deal damage cause the @Condition[burning] condition.

The Burning effect lasts for 3 Rounds and deals half your Intellect score as Fire damage to both Health and Morale.

gesturepulse0000.name: Gesture: Pulse
gesturepulse0000.description:
Expel the arcane power of a Rune in a radius that travels outward with you at its center.

The Pulse gesture scales using Presence and produces an emanation with 10 foot radius, dealing 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. The gesture requires 2 Hands to cast and has a base cost of 5 Action and 2 Focus.

Playtest Notes

This talent is currently placed at a Tier 4 node. It will eventually only be attainable at a higher level (probably Level 6 required). It is currently available "early" for testing.

lightWeaponTrain.name: Light Weapon Training
lightWeaponTrain.description: You know how to wield light weapons fluidly with a high degree of maneuverability and grace in combat. You are Trained with all weapons in the Light and Balanced categories.

lunge.name: Lunge
lunge.description:
You dart forward nimbly, making a strike with sudden and unexpected swiftness to perform a Strike with a weapon which scales using Dexterity against a single target, with an increased range of +2 feet.

The attack is Difficult, but you do not move from your current position nor does this attack provoke Disengagement.

arcanaNovice0000.name: Arcana Novice
arcanaNovice0000.description:
Your education covered the fundamentals of metaphysics and magical theory, the relationship between the runes, the opposing nature of order and chaos, and a cursory introduction to spiritual beings including the most commonly known deified and demonized figures of worship. You gain the Novice rank in the Arcana skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

Your rudimentary understanding of the principle grammar of magic is sufficient to identify which lesser rune a spell or ritual may be using, as well as the gesture used (if not the inflection). You can identify whether a figure is influenced more by chaos or by order, and can spot the signs of common spirits (both lesser and greater). You know enough about religious customs to communicate with those who worship a particular spirit or deity without embarrassing yourself.

strategicreposit.name: Strategic Repositioning
strategicreposit.description:
You are always thinking ahead about where to position yourself should danger loom. Before Turn 1 of a Combat encounter, provided that you are not @Condition[unaware], you may immediately move 4 feet in any permitted direction.

If multiple combatants have this feature, repositioning occurs in reverse order of Initiative.

Playtest Notes

This talent is not yet automated.

lightbringer0000.name: Lightbringer
lightbringer0000.description:
You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Illumination. When you cast a Spell or use an action that involves this Rune, your Critical Hits which deal damage cause the @Condition[irradiated] condition.

The Irradiated effect lasts for 1 Round and deals your Presence score as Radiant damage to both Health and Morale.

awarenessNovice0.name: Awareness Novice
awarenessNovice0.description:
You have been trained in the basics of situational awareness, and are able to notice important details about your environment. You gain the Novice rank in the Awareness skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know to check for exits when you enter a room, and how to look for concealed weapons, hidden traps, and other threats. You know how to spot when you are being followed, and how to search for common hiding places.

versatileTransla.name: Versatile Translator
versatileTransla.description:
You have a scholarly background in linguistics or an intuitive knack for languages. Your capabilities enable you to decipher the basic meaning of text written in a variety of languages.

You can translate text of a language you do not know that is written using a common set of glyphs or characters to a language that you do know. Creating such a translation requires spending one minute per word to transcribe the text into a language which you understand.

Your translations are rudimentary and often lack nuance, but they do contain all essential points of the text.

runeOblivion0000.name: Rune: Oblivion
runeOblivion0000.description:
A chaotic force of destruction and annihilation of existence. The Oblivion rune governs unmaking of matter or decoherence of spirit.

The Oblivion rune scales using Intellect, targets Willpower, and deals Void damage to Morale. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Soul.

erase.name: Erase
erase.description:
Your command of the Rune of Oblivion allows you to unravel tiny holes in the fabric of existence, producing one of the following effects:

  • Disintegrate a non-magical object you hold smaller than a 6-inch cube, sundering it to a fine particulate dust of its component elements.

  • Anesthetize the ability to feel emotion from yourself or a willing target that you touch, causing it to enter a placid, stoic, or dispassionate state. This effect can be maintained as long as you make no further Action.

  • Subdue the potency of a light source, causing its visible radius to be reduced by half for as long as you maintain physical contact with it. Only one light source may be dampened in this way at a given time.

Erase may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

iramancer0000000.name: Iramancer
iramancer0000000.description: Your feats of arcana are fueled by anger. While @Condition[enraged] you may still spend Focus and you deal 2 additional damage to all spell attacks.

counterspell0000.name: Counterspell
counterspell0000.description:
You immediately react to a spell being cast and compose a rune and gesture designed to unravel and negate the spellcraft of an enemy mage.

Playtest Notes

This action can now be used in playtesting, but it is not yet fully automated. The Counterspell can be performed, but it is up to the Gamemaster to manually reverse a previously applied spell and to manually deduct its Action and Focus cost. These steps of the overall Counterspell workflow will be automated in a subsequent update such that a confirmed Counterspell will also confirm the spell that was countered, but with its effects removed.

counterspell.name: Counterspell
counterspell.condition: Another creature which you can see is casting a spell.
counterspell.description:
You form arcane energy into a countervailing spellcraft, targeting a spellcaster you can see within 30 feet.

Designate a Rune and Gesture which you know to attempt to counter the spell. Choosing a Rune which is opposed to one used in the spell grants +2 Boons to your attempt. Selecting the identical Gesture as the one being cast also adds +2 Boons to your attempt.

Perform a harmless Spell Attack against your target's Willpower defense. If your roll exceeds their defense, the spell is countered and its magic is nullified, producing no effects.

runeFlame0000000.name: Rune: Flame
runeFlame0000000.description:
The chaotic force of elemental, thermal energy. The Flame rune governs fire and heat.

The Flame rune scales using Intellect, targets Reflex, and deals Fire damage to Health. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Frost.

enkindle.name: Enkindle
enkindle.description:
Your command of the Rune of Flame allows you to manipulate fire and thermal energy in creative ways, producing one of the following effects:

  • Manifest a burst of elemental flame in one inch sphere which can ignite a candle, torch, or other flammable materials.

  • Imbue your body with momentary thermal shielding which provides you with immunity to fire damage on an immediately subsequent action that costs 1 Action or less.

  • Control the movement of flames within a small area, causing them to flicker, dance, or shift in an animated performance of light and shadow.

Enkindle may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

flameProficiency.name: Flame Proficiency
flameProficiency.description:
You have fluency in weaving spellcraft using the Rune of Flame. You gain a +1 Skill Bonus for spells cast using this Rune.

Playtest Notes

This talent will eventually also provide an upgrade to the Enkindle action, expanding its effectiveness or including new options for how to use it.

runeKinesis00000.name: Rune: Kinesis
runeKinesis00000.description:
The chaotic force of space and physical movement. The Kinesis rune governs all things related to the act of movement and physicality.

The Kinesis rune scales using Presence, targets Physical defense, and deals Bludgeoning, Piercing, or Slashing damage to Health. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Control.

propel.name: Propel
propel.description:
Your command of the Rune of Kinesis allows you to exert local control over gravitational forces to perform basic telekinetic manipulations, producing one of the following effects:

  • Pull an unsecured object within 15 feet and with weight no greater than 1 towards you and catch it. An object that is equipped or possessed by a creature is never treated as unsecured unless that creature is willing to release it.

  • Flick an object that you hold with weight no greater than 1 towards a target up to 30 feet away. The object flies unerringly in a straight line towards that target at a moderate speed. Any creature along the object's path can react to catch it as long as they have a free hand with which to do so.

  • Suspend in midair an object or willing creature that you touch with weight less than or equal to 10 times your Presence, altering its position up to 20 feet in any direction from its original location. You can maintain this suspension indefinitely as long as you take no further Action and are not @Condition[incapacitated].

Propel may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch unless otherwise specified. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

gestureBlast0000.name: Gesture: Blast
gestureBlast0000.description:
You hurl the arcane power of a Rune into an intense explosion of energy at a nearby point you can see.

The Blast gesture scales with Intellect and produces a blast with 6 feet radius centered on a point within 60 feet of the spellcaster. The blast deals 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 2 Hands to cast and has a base cost of 5 Action and 2 Focus.

Playtest Notes

This talent is currently placed at a Tier 4 node. It will eventually only be attainable at a higher level (probably Level 6 required). It is currently available "early" for testing.

ancestry.name: Devilkin
ancestry.description: You were born with unexpected magical influence over your creation. Your physical appearance shows tell-tale signs that the superstitious associate with planar beings- crimson flesh, ineffective wings or horns, reptilian eyes. Your dislike of light and preternatural resistance to fire does little to dissuade people from thinking you are an actual devil.

background.name: Performer
background.description: You were a travelling entertainer. You learned to be comfortable attending a variety of social functions, how to play to your audience, embellishing details of your performance to evoke particular emotional responses.

biography.public: Zarajah is a spirited Devilkin with a penchant for pyromancy who weaves dangerous and warding spells to control the battlefield. Zarajah aspires to obtain the War Mage signature Talent.

description.public: Longer and heavier than a standard longsword, the greatsword is a two-handed blade meant for powerful sweeping strikes, its length commanding both reach and awe.
A layer of vertical metal strips riveted to a backing of leather or mail, splint armor offers strong limb protection while sacrificing some flexibility.

cadence000000000.name: Cadence
cadence000000000.description: You are drilled in performing sequences of melee attacks with rhythmic precision. When you Strike multiple times in sequence using a one-handed melee weapon you gain a stacking +1 Boon for each successive attack.

athleticsNovice0.name: Athletics Novice
athleticsNovice0.description:
You have received training in basic athletics. You gain the Novice rank in the Athletics skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know whether a surface can support your weight or not, how to find handholds while climbing, and how to distribute your weight for buoyancy when swimming. You know how to run for distance, and how to pace yourself to avoid exhaustion.

intimidationNovi.name: Intimidation Novice
intimidationNovi.description:
You understand the fundamentals of how threats and coercion can achieve desired outcomes. You gain the Novice rank in the Intimidation skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know how to use simple displays of violence or overt threats to get others to follow your lead, but you aren't very subtle.

heavyWeaponTrain.name: Heavy Weapon Training
heavyWeaponTrain.description: You know how to use a heavy weapon to deliver punishing blows, putting your entire strength behind every swing. You are Trained with all weapons in the Heavy and Balanced categories.

heavyStrike.name: Heavy Strike
heavyStrike.description: You unleash a powerful Strike with your mainhand weapon. The attack is slower to execute, but is Empowered to deliver additional damage.

gesturearrow0000.name: Gesture: Arrow
gesturearrow0000.description:
You hurl a projectile imbued with the magical power of a Rune at a distant target.

The Arrow gesture scales using Intellect and targets a single creature up to a distance of 60 feet, dealing 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

runeFlame0000000.name: Rune: Flame
runeFlame0000000.description:
The chaotic force of elemental, thermal energy. The Flame rune governs fire and heat.

The Flame rune scales using Intellect, targets Reflex, and deals Fire damage to Health. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Frost.
